ChatGPT said:

Fix this file first because app-shell.tsx is currently throwing multiple TypeScript errors.

Replace:

src/presentation/components/app-shell.tsx

With this complete code:

TypeScript
"use client";

import Link from "next/link";
import { usePathname, useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { useMemo, useState, type ReactNode } from "react";
import {
  BarChart3,
  Bell,
  BriefcaseBusiness,
  CheckCircle2,
  ChevronDown,
  CircleDollarSign,
  FileBarChart,
  FileSpreadsheet,
  FileText,
  LayoutDashboard,
  Menu,
  Plus,
  ReceiptText,
  Search,
  Settings,
  Upload,
  Users,
  X,
} from "lucide-react";
import { routes } from "@/lib/routes";
import { BrandMark } from "@/presentation/components/brand-mark";
import { useAuth } from "@/presentation/providers/auth-provider";
import { useBusinessData } from "@/presentation/providers/business-data-provider";

const navItems = [
  ["Dashboard", routes.dashboard, LayoutDashboard],
  ["Clients", routes.clients, Users],
  ["Projects", routes.projects, BriefcaseBusiness],
  ["Quotations", routes.quotations, FileText],
  ["Ongoing Projects", routes.ongoingProjects, CircleDollarSign],
  ["Completed Projects", routes.completedProjects, CheckCircle2],
  ["Invoices & Payments", routes.invoices, ReceiptText],
  ["Pending Payments", routes.pendingPayments, CircleDollarSign],
  ["Statements", routes.statements, FileBarChart],
  ["Excel Import / Export", routes.excelExport, FileSpreadsheet],
  ["Reports", routes.reports, BarChart3],
] as const;

type SearchResult = {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle: string;
  href: string;
  type: string;
};

function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null) {
    return value as Record<string, unknown>;
  }

  return {};
}

function readString(value: unknown, fallback = "") {
  return typeof value === "string" ? value : fallback;
}

function readNumber(value: unknown, fallback = 0) {
  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : fallback;
}

function readFirstString(
  record: Record<string, unknown>,
  keys: string[],
  fallback = ""
) {
  for (const key of keys) {
    const value = record[key];

    if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim()) {
      return value;
    }
  }

  return fallback;
}

export function AppShell({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const router = useRouter();
  const { user, logout } = useAuth();
  const { data, syncState, forceSync } = useBusinessData();

  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [searchOpen, setSearchOpen] = useState(false);
  const [syncing, setSyncing] = useState(false);

  const searchResults = useMemo<SearchResult[]>(() => {
    const query = search.trim().toLowerCase();

    if (!query) return [];

    const clients = data.clients
      .map((client) => {
        const record = asRecord(client);

        const id = readFirstString(record, ["id"], crypto.randomUUID());
        const title = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["companyName", "company", "name", "clientName"],
          "Unnamed Client"
        );
        const city = readFirstString(record, ["city", "location"], "No city");
        const contact = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["contactPerson", "contact", "phone", "mobile"],
          "No contact"
        );

        return {
          id,
          title,
          subtitle: `${city} • ${contact}`,
          href: routes.clients,
          type: "Client",
        };
      })
      .filter((item) => {
        const target = `${item.id} ${item.title} ${item.subtitle}`.toLowerCase();
        return target.includes(query);
      })
      .slice(0, 4);

    const projects = data.projects
      .map((project) => {
        const record = asRecord(project);

        const id = readFirstString(record, ["id", "projectId"], crypto.randomUUID());
        const title = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["companyName", "company", "clientName", "customerName"],
          "Unnamed Project"
        );
        const location = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["location", "site", "storeBranch", "branch"],
          "No location"
        );
        const work = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["description", "workDescription", "scope", "category"],
          "No description"
        );

        return {
          id,
          title,
          subtitle: `${id} • ${location} • ${work}`,
          href: routes.projects,
          type: "Project",
        };
      })
      .filter((item) => {
        const target = `${item.id} ${item.title} ${item.subtitle}`.toLowerCase();
        return target.includes(query);
      })
      .slice(0, 4);

    const invoices = data.invoices
      .map((invoice) => {
        const record = asRecord(invoice);

        const id = readFirstString(record, ["id", "invoiceNo"], crypto.randomUUID());
        const title = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["companyName", "company", "clientName", "customerName"],
          "Unnamed Invoice"
        );
        const status = readFirstString(record, ["status", "paymentStatus"], "unknown");
        const amount = readNumber(record.amount ?? record.invoiceAmount, 0);

        return {
          id,
          title,
          subtitle: `${id} • ${status} • ${amount}`,
          href: routes.invoices,
          type: "Invoice",
        };
      })
      .filter((item) => {
        const target = `${item.id} ${item.title} ${item.subtitle}`.toLowerCase();
        return target.includes(query);
      })
      .slice(0, 4);

    return [...clients, ...projects, ...invoices].slice(0, 8);
  }, [data.clients, data.invoices, data.projects, search]);

  async function handleSignOut() {
    await logout();
    router.replace(routes.login);
  }

  async function handleForceSync() {
    if (syncing) return;

    setSyncing(true);

    try {
      await forceSync();
    } finally {
      setSyncing(false);
    }
  }

  function handleResultClick(href: string) {
    setSearch("");
    setSearchOpen(false);
    setMobileOpen(false);
    router.push(href);
  }

  return (
    <div className="app-frame">
      {mobileOpen ? (
        <button
          className="sidebar-backdrop"
          aria-label="Close navigation"
          onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
          type="button"
        />
      ) : null}

      <aside className={`sidebar ${mobileOpen ? "sidebar--open" : ""}`}>
        <div className="sidebar__brand">
          <BrandMark inverse />

          <button
            className="sidebar__close"
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
            aria-label="Close menu"
            type="button"
          >
            <X />
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="sidebar__quick-actions">
          <Link
            className="sidebar__primary"
            href={routes.excelExport}
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
          >
            <Upload size={16} />
            Import / Export
          </Link>

          <Link
            className="sidebar__primary sidebar__primary--ghost"
            href={routes.newProject}
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
          >
            <Plus size={16} />
            New Project
          </Link>
        </div>

        <nav className="sidebar__nav" aria-label="Main navigation">
          {navItems.map(([label, href, Icon]) => {
            const isActive =
              pathname === href ||
              (href === routes.projects && pathname.startsWith("/projects"));

            return (
              <Link
                key={href}
                href={href}
                onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
                className={isActive ? "is-active" : ""}
              >
                <Icon size={17} />
                <span>{label}</span>
              </Link>
            );
          })}
        </nav>

        <div className="sidebar__footer">
          <button
            className={`sync-pill sync-pill--${syncState}`}
            type="button"
            onClick={handleForceSync}
            disabled={syncing}
            title="Force cloud sync"
          >
            <span />
            {syncing ? "Syncing..." : syncState}
          </button>

          <Link
            className={`sidebar__settings ${
              pathname === routes.settings ? "is-active" : ""
            }`}
            href={routes.settings}
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
          >
            <Settings size={17} />
            <span>Settings</span>
          </Link>
        </div>
      </aside>

      <div className="app-main">
        <header className="topbar">
          <div className="topbar__left">
            <button
              className="mobile-menu"
              onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
              aria-label="Open menu"
              type="button"
            >
              <Menu />
            </button>

            <strong>3Star Business Suite</strong>
          </div>

          <div className="topbar__search-wrap">
            <label className="topbar__search">
              <Search size={15} />
              <input
                placeholder="Search clients, projects, invoices..."
                aria-label="Global search"
                value={search}
                onChange={(event) => {
                  setSearch(event.target.value);
                  setSearchOpen(true);
                }}
                onFocus={() => setSearchOpen(true)}
              />
            </label>

            {searchOpen && search.trim() ? (
              <div className="global-search-menu">
                {searchResults.length ? (
                  searchResults.map((item) => (
                    <button
                      key={`${item.type}-${item.id}`}
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => handleResultClick(item.href)}
                    >
                      <span>{item.type}</span>
                      <strong>{item.title}</strong>
                      <small>{item.subtitle}</small>
                    </button>
                  ))
                ) : (
                  <div className="global-search-empty">No records found.</div>
                )}
              </div>
            ) : null}
          </div>

          <div className="topbar__actions">
            <Link
              className="button button--primary topbar__import"
              href={routes.excelExport}
            >
              <Upload size={14} />
              Import / Export
            </Link>

            <Link className="button topbar__new" href={routes.newProject}>
              <Plus size={14} />
              New Project
            </Link>

            <button aria-label="Notifications" type="button">
              <Bell size={17} />
            </button>

            <button
              className="profile-button"
              onClick={handleSignOut}
              title="Sign out"
              type="button"
            >
              <span>{user?.email?.slice(0, 1).toUpperCase() || "U"}</span>
              <ChevronDown size={14} />
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>

        {searchOpen && search.trim() ? (
          <button
            className="search-backdrop"
            aria-label="Close search"
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setSearchOpen(false)}
          />
        ) : null}

        <main className="app-content">{children}</main>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

This removes the TypeScript errors from:

Property 'companyName' does not exist on type 'Project'
Property 'location' does not exist on type 'Project'
Property 'description' does not exist on type 'Project'

It does that by safely reading possible field names from your imported workbook data instead of assuming the exact TypeScript model names.

Reply next and I’ll fix the next error file:

src/presentation/features/projects/new-project-screen.tsx

You said:

next and solve this with nex screen code

ChatGPT said:

Replace this file:

src/presentation/features/projects/new-project-screen.tsx

With this complete code:

TypeScript
"use client";

import Link from "next/link";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { ArrowLeft, Save } from "lucide-react";
import { useMemo, useState, type FormEvent } from "react";
import { routes } from "@/lib/routes";
import type { BusinessDataSet } from "@/domain/entities/business";
import { PageHeader } from "@/presentation/components/ui";
import { useBusinessData } from "@/presentation/providers/business-data-provider";

type Project = BusinessDataSet["projects"][number];

type Client = BusinessDataSet["clients"][number];

type ProjectStatus =
  | "upcoming"
  | "in-progress"
  | "on-hold"
  | "completed"
  | "cancelled";

const statusOptions: { label: string; value: ProjectStatus }[] = [
  { label: "Upcoming", value: "upcoming" },
  { label: "In Progress", value: "in-progress" },
  { label: "On Hold", value: "on-hold" },
  { label: "Completed", value: "completed" },
  { label: "Cancelled", value: "cancelled" },
];

const categoryOptions = [
  "Automatic Door",
  "Rolling Shutter",
  "Glass Work",
  "Aluminium Work",
  "Maintenance",
  "Installation",
  "Other",
];

function today() {
  return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

function createProjectId(count: number) {
  return `PROJ-${String(count + 1).padStart(5, "0")}`;
}

function toNumber(value: string) {
  const parsed = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : 0;
}

function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null) {
    return value as Record<string, unknown>;
  }

  return {};
}

function readString(value: unknown, fallback = "") {
  return typeof value === "string" ? value : fallback;
}

function readFirstString(
  record: Record<string, unknown>,
  keys: string[],
  fallback = ""
) {
  for (const key of keys) {
    const value = record[key];

    if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim()) {
      return value;
    }
  }

  return fallback;
}

function getClientCompanyName(client: Client) {
  const record = asRecord(client);

  return readFirstString(
    record,
    ["companyName", "company", "name", "clientName", "customerName"],
    ""
  );
}

export function NewProjectScreen() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { data, createProject, syncState } = useBusinessData();

  const [companyName, setCompanyName] = useState("");
  const [storeBranch, setStoreBranch] = useState("");
  const [location, setLocation] = useState("");
  const [description, setDescription] = useState("");
  const [category, setCategory] = useState(categoryOptions[0]);
  const [quotationNo, setQuotationNo] = useState("");
  const [woNo, setWoNo] = useState("");
  const [value, setValue] = useState("");
  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(today());
  const [expectedCompletion, setExpectedCompletion] = useState("");
  const [actualCompletion, setActualCompletion] = useState("");
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<ProjectStatus>("upcoming");
  const [completion, setCompletion] = useState("0");
  const [remarks, setRemarks] = useState("");

  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState("");

  const nextProjectId = useMemo(() => {
    return createProjectId(data.projects.length);
  }, [data.projects.length]);

  const clientOptions = useMemo(() => {
    return data.clients
      .map((client) => ({
        id: readString(asRecord(client).id, crypto.randomUUID()),
        companyName: getClientCompanyName(client),
      }))
      .filter((client) => client.companyName.trim());
  }, [data.clients]);

  function validate() {
    if (!companyName.trim()) return "Company name is required.";
    if (!location.trim()) return "Location is required.";
    if (!description.trim()) return "Work description is required.";

    const projectValue = toNumber(value);
    const progress = toNumber(completion);

    if (projectValue < 0) return "Project value cannot be negative.";

    if (progress < 0 || progress > 100) {
      return "Completion must be between 0 and 100.";
    }

    if (status === "completed" && !actualCompletion) {
      return "Actual completion date is required for completed projects.";
    }

    return "";
  }

  async function handleSubmit(event: FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) {
    event.preventDefault();

    const validationError = validate();

    if (validationError) {
      setError(validationError);
      return;
    }

    setSubmitting(true);
    setError("");

    const project = {
      id: nextProjectId,

      companyName: companyName.trim(),
      company: companyName.trim(),
      clientName: companyName.trim(),

      storeBranch: storeBranch.trim(),
      branch: storeBranch.trim(),

      location: location.trim(),
      site: location.trim(),

      description: description.trim(),
      workDescription: description.trim(),
      scope: description.trim(),

      category,

      quotationNo: quotationNo.trim(),
      quotationNumber: quotationNo.trim(),

      woNo: woNo.trim(),
      workOrderNo: woNo.trim(),

      value: toNumber(value),
      projectValue: toNumber(value),

      startDate,
      expectedCompletion,
      expectedCompletionDate: expectedCompletion,
      actualCompletion,
      actualCompletionDate: actualCompletion,

      status,
      completion: toNumber(completion),
      completionPercentage: toNumber(completion),

      remarks: remarks.trim(),
    } as unknown as Project;

    try {
      await createProject(project);
      router.replace(routes.projects);
    } catch (caughtError) {
      setError(
        caughtError instanceof Error
          ? caughtError.message
          : "Project could not be saved."
      );
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <>
      <PageHeader
        title="New Project"
        description={`Create a project manually. UI updates instantly. Cloud status: ${syncState}.`}
        actions={
          <Link className="button" href={routes.projects}>
            <ArrowLeft size={14} />
            Back to Projects
          </Link>
        }
      />

      <form className="record-form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
        <section className="card form-section">
          <header>
            <h2>Client & Work Details</h2>
            <p>Basic company, branch, location, and work information.</p>
          </header>

          <div className="form-grid">
            <label className="field">
              <span>Company Name *</span>
              <input
                list="clients-list"
                value={companyName}
                onChange={(event) => setCompanyName(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Company / client name"
              />

              <datalist id="clients-list">
                {clientOptions.map((client) => (
                  <option key={client.id} value={client.companyName} />
                ))}
              </datalist>
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Store / Branch</span>
              <input
                value={storeBranch}
                onChange={(event) => setStoreBranch(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Store or branch"
              />
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Location *</span>
              <input
                value={location}
                onChange={(event) => setLocation(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Project location"
              />
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Category</span>
              <select
                value={category}
                onChange={(event) => setCategory(event.target.value)}
              >
                {categoryOptions.map((item) => (
                  <option key={item}>{item}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </label>

            <label className="field field--full">
              <span>Work Description *</span>
              <textarea
                value={description}
                onChange={(event) => setDescription(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Describe the project work"
                rows={4}
              />
            </label>
          </div>
        </section>

        <section className="card form-section">
          <header>
            <h2>Commercial Details</h2>
            <p>Quotation, work order, value, and dates.</p>
          </header>

          <div className="form-grid">
            <label className="field">
              <span>Project ID</span>
              <input value={nextProjectId} disabled />
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Quotation No</span>
              <input
                value={quotationNo}
                onChange={(event) => setQuotationNo(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Quotation number"
              />
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>WO No</span>
              <input
                value={woNo}
                onChange={(event) => setWoNo(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Work order number"
              />
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Project Value</span>
              <input
                type="number"
                min="0"
                step="0.01"
                value={value}
                onChange={(event) => setValue(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="0.00"
              />
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Start Date</span>
              <input
                type="date"
                value={startDate}
                onChange={(event) => setStartDate(event.target.value)}
              />
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Expected Completion</span>
              <input
                type="date"
                value={expectedCompletion}
                onChange={(event) => setExpectedCompletion(event.target.value)}
              />
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Actual Completion</span>
              <input
                type="date"
                value={actualCompletion}
                onChange={(event) => setActualCompletion(event.target.value)}
              />
            </label>
          </div>
        </section>

        <section className="card form-section">
          <header>
            <h2>Status & Notes</h2>
            <p>Status controls where this project appears in the app.</p>
          </header>

          <div className="form-grid">
            <label className="field">
              <span>Status</span>
              <select
                value={status}
                onChange={(event) =>
                  setStatus(event.target.value as ProjectStatus)
                }
              >
                {statusOptions.map((item) => (
                  <option key={item.value} value={item.value}>
                    {item.label}
                  </option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </label>

            <label className="field">
              <span>Completion %</span>
              <input
                type="number"
                min="0"
                max="100"
                value={completion}
                onChange={(event) => setCompletion(event.target.value)}
              />
            </label>

            <label className="field field--full">
              <span>Remarks</span>
              <textarea
                value={remarks}
                onChange={(event) => setRemarks(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Remarks / internal notes"
                rows={4}
              />
            </label>
          </div>
        </section>

        {error ? (
          <div className="form-message form-message--error">{error}</div>
        ) : null}

        <div className="form-actions">
          <Link className="button" href={routes.projects}>
            Cancel
          </Link>

          <button
            className="button button--primary"
            type="submit"
            disabled={submitting}
          >
            <Save size={14} />
            {submitting ? "Saving..." : "Save Project"}
          </button>
        </div>
      </form>
    </>
  );
}

This fixes the error:

'companyName' does not exist in type 'Project'

Because your actual imported Project type does not declare those names. This version safely stores multiple compatible field names and casts the final object to your workbook project type.

The remaining error is:

Cannot find module '@/presentation/features/projects/projects-screen'

Reply next and I’ll give the missing file:

src/presentation/features/projects/projects-screen.tsx

You said:

next

ChatGPT said:

Replace or append to this file:

src/app/globals.css

Use this complete add-on block at the bottom of the file:

CSS
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* 3Star Business Suite - Interactive CRUD / Inline Edit UX                   */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.sidebar__quick-actions {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  margin: 18px 0;
}

.sidebar__primary--ghost {
  border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.14);
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06);
}

.sidebar__footer {
  margin-top: auto;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.sync-pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 34px;
  width: 100%;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06);
  color: rgb(226 232 240);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: capitalize;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    border-color 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease;
}

.sync-pill:hover {
  border-color: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.45);
  background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.14);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sync-pill:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.sync-pill span {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #94a3b8;
}

.sync-pill--synced span {
  background: #22c55e;
}

.sync-pill--syncing span {
  background: #38bdf8;
}

.sync-pill--offline span {
  background: #f59e0b;
}

.sync-pill--error span {
  background: #ef4444;
}

.topbar__search-wrap {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 520px;
}

.global-search-menu {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 60;
  top: calc(100% + 10px);
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow:
    0 20px 25px -5px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.14),
    0 8px 10px -6px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.1);
}

.global-search-menu button {
  display: grid;
  width: 100%;
  gap: 3px;
  border: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.global-search-menu button:hover {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.global-search-menu button span {
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}

.global-search-menu button strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.global-search-menu button small {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 12px;
}

.global-search-empty {
  padding: 16px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.search-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 50;
  inset: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
}

.topbar__new,
.topbar__import {
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Forms                                                                      */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.record-form {
  display: grid;
  gap: 18px;
}

.form-section header {
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.form-section h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.form-section p {
  margin-top: 4px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.form-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
}

.field {
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
}

.field--full {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.field span {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.field input,
.field select,
.field textarea {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 44px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 10px 13px;
  color: var(--navy);
  outline: none;
  transition:
    border-color 150ms ease,
    box-shadow 150ms ease,
    background 150ms ease;
}

.field textarea {
  resize: vertical;
}

.field input:focus,
.field select:focus,
.field textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgb(16 185 129 / 0.12);
}

.field input:disabled {
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #64748b;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.form-actions {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 12px;
}

.form-message {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 10px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 650;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.form-message--error {
  border: 1px solid #fecaca;
  background: #fef2f2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

.form-message--success {
  border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  color: #166534;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Table Toolbar / CRUD Tables                                                */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.table-toolbar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 1fr) 180px 200px;
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: center;
}

.toolbar-search {
  display: flex;
  min-height: 44px;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 13px;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.toolbar-search input {
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--navy);
  outline: none;
}

.inline-input,
.inline-select {
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 130px;
  min-height: 36px;
  border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 7px 10px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 650;
  outline: none;
  transition:
    border-color 150ms ease,
    box-shadow 150ms ease;
}

.inline-input--wide {
  min-width: 220px;
}

.inline-input:focus,
.inline-select:focus {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(16 185 129 / 0.12);
}

.inline-select {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.progress-cell {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.progress-cell > div {
  width: 90px;
  height: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #e2e8f0;
}

.progress-cell > div > span {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: inherit;
  background: var(--emerald);
}

.progress-cell small {
  min-width: 36px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.row-actions {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.icon-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  width: 34px;
  height: 34px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #475569;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    border-color 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease,
    transform 150ms ease;
}

.icon-button:hover {
  border-color: #cbd5e1;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.icon-button:active {
  transform: scale(0.96);
}

.icon-button--success {
  border-color: #bbf7d0;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  color: #166534;
}

.icon-button--success:hover {
  border-color: #86efac;
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #14532d;
}

.icon-button--danger {
  border-color: #fecaca;
  background: #fef2f2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

.icon-button--danger:hover {
  border-color: #fca5a5;
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #7f1d1d;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Excel Import / Export                                                      */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.file-input {
  display: none;
}

.import-panel {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(340px, 480px);
  gap: 24px;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.import-panel--hero {
  border-color: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.24);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgb(16 185 129 / 0.09), transparent 34%),
    #ffffff;
}

.import-panel__content {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

.import-panel__content h2 {
  margin-top: 14px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.import-panel__content p {
  margin-top: 10px;
  max-width: 660px;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.drop-zone {
  min-height: 240px;
  border: 2px dashed #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 22px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 28px;
  color: #64748b;
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    border-color 160ms ease,
    background 160ms ease,
    color 160ms ease,
    transform 160ms ease;
}

.drop-zone:hover {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  background: #ecfdf5;
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.drop-zone--active {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  background: #d1fae5;
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  transform: scale(1.01);
}

.drop-zone--busy {
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.drop-zone strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 16px;
}

.drop-zone span {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13px;
}

.sync-state {
  margin-top: 18px;
  display: inline-flex;
  width: fit-content;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 7px 12px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: capitalize;
}

.sync-state--synced {
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #166534;
}

.sync-state--syncing {
  background: #e0f2fe;
  color: #075985;
}

.sync-state--offline {
  background: #fef3c7;
  color: #92400e;
}

.sync-state--error {
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

.export-control-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 18px;
}

.export-control-panel__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
}

.export-control-panel__header h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.export-control-panel__header p {
  margin-top: 4px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
}

.export-filters {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 1fr) 220px 200px;
  gap: 12px;
}

.export-summary-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
}

.export-summary-grid > div {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  padding: 14px;
}

.export-summary-grid span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.export-summary-grid strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 8px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.spin {
  animation: spin 850ms linear infinite;
}

@keyframes spin {
  to {
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Responsive                                                                 */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .import-panel {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .export-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .topbar__new {
    display: none;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .form-grid,
  .table-toolbar,
  .export-filters {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .export-control-panel__header {
    align-items: stretch;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .topbar__import {
    display: none;
  }

  .topbar__search-wrap {
    max-width: none;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .export-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .drop-zone {
    min-height: 200px;
  }

  .form-actions {
    flex-direction: column-reverse;
  }

  .form-actions .button {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

This styles:

Inline edit inputs
Status dropdowns
Quick row actions
Delete/save/cancel buttons
New project form
Search/filter toolbar
Global search dropdown
Sync pill
Excel import/export drag-drop
Export center controls

Reply next and I’ll give the next complete file:

src/presentation/features/export/export-screen.tsx

You said:

the whole ui is super tiny and text sizes are very tiny unbold make everything a bit larger header texts large and bold and the ui should fill the whole screen and cover emty spaces

ChatGPT said:

Replace this file first:

src/app/globals.css

Use this full UI scale override at the bottom of the file. Do not remove your existing CSS yet; paste this after everything so it overrides the tiny UI.

CSS
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* 3Star Business Suite - Large Professional UI Scale Override                */
/* Paste this at the VERY BOTTOM of src/app/globals.css                       */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

:root {
  --navy: #0f172a;
  --muted: #64748b;
  --border: #e2e8f0;
  --emerald: #10b981;
  --emerald-dark: #047857;
  --surface: #f8fafc;
}

/* Global readability */
html {
  font-size: 16px;
}

body {
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  background: #f8fafc;
}

/* App should fill screen properly */
.app-frame {
  min-height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.app-main {
  min-height: 100vh;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.app-content {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  flex: 1;
  padding: 28px;
  display: grid;
  gap: 22px;
}

/* Sidebar larger */
.sidebar {
  width: 300px;
  min-width: 300px;
  padding: 24px 18px;
}

.sidebar__brand {
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}

.sidebar__nav {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
}

.sidebar__nav a,
.sidebar__settings,
.sidebar__primary {
  min-height: 46px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.sidebar__nav svg,
.sidebar__settings svg,
.sidebar__primary svg {
  width: 19px;
  height: 19px;
}

.sidebar__quick-actions {
  margin: 22px 0;
}

/* Topbar larger */
.topbar {
  min-height: 76px;
  padding: 0 28px;
  gap: 18px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.topbar__left strong {
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

.topbar__search {
  min-height: 46px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 0 15px;
}

.topbar__search input {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.topbar__actions {
  gap: 10px;
}

.profile-button {
  min-height: 44px;
  padding: 7px 10px;
}

.profile-button span {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

/* Buttons bigger and stronger */
.button {
  min-height: 44px;
  padding: 0 18px;
  border-radius: 13px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 850;
  gap: 8px;
}

.button svg {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
}

/* Page header bigger */
.page-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 20px;
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 2px;
}

.page-header h1,
.page-title,
h1 {
  font-size: 34px !important;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.page-header p {
  margin-top: 8px;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.page-header__actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
}

/* Cards fill space and feel premium */
.card {
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 24px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow:
    0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04),
    0 8px 24px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04);
}

.card__header {
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.card__header h2,
.card h2,
.form-section h2,
.export-control-panel__header h2 {
  font-size: 22px !important;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.card p,
.form-section p,
.export-control-panel__header p,
.import-panel__content p {
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.75;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--muted);
}

/* Metrics / dashboard cards larger */
.metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
}

.metric-card {
  min-height: 150px;
  padding: 22px;
}

.metric-card p {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.metric-card strong {
  margin-top: 10px;
  display: block;
  font-size: 31px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.metric-card__icon {
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  border-radius: 14px;
}

.metric-card__icon svg {
  width: 19px;
  height: 19px;
}

.metric-card__trend {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

/* Forms larger */
.record-form {
  gap: 22px;
}

.form-section header {
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.form-grid {
  gap: 18px;
}

.field {
  gap: 9px;
}

.field span {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 850;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.field input,
.field select,
.field textarea,
.select {
  min-height: 48px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 11px 14px;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.field textarea {
  min-height: 120px;
}

/* Toolbar larger */
.table-toolbar {
  padding: 18px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(360px, 1fr) 210px 240px;
}

.toolbar-search {
  min-height: 48px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 0 15px;
}

.toolbar-search input {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

/* Tables larger and easier to read */
.table-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.data-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: separate;
  border-spacing: 0;
  font-size: 15px;
}

.data-table th {
  height: 52px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #334155;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.data-table td {
  min-height: 58px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  color: #1e293b;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 650;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.data-table tbody tr:hover {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

/* Inline editing bigger */
.inline-input,
.inline-select {
  min-height: 42px;
  min-width: 150px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 8px 11px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.inline-input--wide {
  min-width: 260px;
}

.row-actions {
  gap: 8px;
}

.icon-button {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.icon-button svg {
  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;
}

/* Status/progress more visible */
.progress-cell > div {
  width: 120px;
  height: 10px;
}

.progress-cell small {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.status-badge,
.badge {
  min-height: 28px;
  padding: 5px 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

/* Import/export larger */
.import-panel {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.1fr) minmax(420px, 560px);
  gap: 26px;
}

.import-panel__content h2 {
  font-size: 26px !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
}

.export-card__icon {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  border-radius: 16px;
}

.export-card__icon svg {
  width: 25px;
  height: 25px;
}

.drop-zone {
  min-height: 300px;
  border-radius: 24px;
  padding: 34px;
}

.drop-zone strong {
  font-size: 19px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

.drop-zone span {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.export-filters {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(360px, 1fr) 260px 240px;
}

.export-summary-grid {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.export-summary-grid > div {
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: 16px;
}

.export-summary-grid span {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.export-summary-grid strong {
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

/* Global search larger */
.global-search-menu {
  border-radius: 18px;
}

.global-search-menu button {
  padding: 14px 16px;
}

.global-search-menu button span {
  font-size: 12px;
}

.global-search-menu button strong {
  font-size: 16px;
}

.global-search-menu button small {
  font-size: 13px;
}

/* Empty states should occupy space */
.empty-state,
.data-table .empty-row td {
  min-height: 220px;
  padding: 50px 20px !important;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 750;
  color: var(--muted);
}

/* Make two-column layouts breathe */
.grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 22px;
}

.chart {
  min-height: 280px;
}

.donut-wrap {
  min-height: 280px;
}

/* Responsive */
@media (max-width: 1280px) {
  .metrics {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  }

  .grid-2 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .import-panel {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .app-content {
    padding: 22px;
  }

  .page-header {
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .page-header h1,
  .page-title,
  h1 {
    font-size: 30px !important;
  }

  .table-toolbar,
  .form-grid,
  .export-filters,
  .export-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .metrics {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .sidebar {
    width: 300px;
    min-width: 300px;
  }

  .topbar {
    min-height: 68px;
    padding: 0 16px;
  }

  .app-content {
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .card {
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .topbar__search-wrap {
    display: none;
  }

  .page-header h1,
  .page-title,
  h1 {
    font-size: 27px !important;
  }
}

This will make the UI:

larger
bolder
more readable
full-width
less empty-looking
better table spacing
better card spacing
better dashboard scale
larger forms
larger buttons
larger headers

Reply next and I’ll give the next file to improve the Projects page layout itself so it fills the screen better instead of only relying on CSS.


You said:

next

ChatGPT said:

Replace this file:

src/presentation/features/projects/projects-screen.tsx

With this complete upgraded version. It makes the Projects screen feel like a real working page: bigger header, KPI cards, proper filters, inline status change, quick edit, delete, and no export button.

TypeScript
"use client";

import Link from "next/link";
import {
  BriefcaseBusiness,
  Check,
  CheckCircle2,
  Clock3,
  Edit3,
  PauseCircle,
  Plus,
  Search,
  Trash2,
  X,
} from "lucide-react";
import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { routes } from "@/lib/routes";
import type { BusinessDataSet } from "@/domain/entities/business";
import {
  EmptyTableRow,
  PageHeader,
  StatusBadge,
} from "@/presentation/components/ui";
import { money } from "@/presentation/data/sample-data";
import { useBusinessData } from "@/presentation/providers/business-data-provider";

type Project = BusinessDataSet["projects"][number];

type ProjectStatus =
  | "upcoming"
  | "in-progress"
  | "on-hold"
  | "completed"
  | "cancelled";

const projectStatusOptions: { label: string; value: ProjectStatus }[] = [
  { label: "Upcoming", value: "upcoming" },
  { label: "In Progress", value: "in-progress" },
  { label: "On Hold", value: "on-hold" },
  { label: "Completed", value: "completed" },
  { label: "Cancelled", value: "cancelled" },
];

const categoryOptions = [
  "Automatic Door",
  "Rolling Shutter",
  "Glass Work",
  "Aluminium Work",
  "Maintenance",
  "Installation",
  "Other",
];

function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null) {
    return value as Record<string, unknown>;
  }

  return {};
}

function readFirstString(
  record: Record<string, unknown>,
  keys: string[],
  fallback = ""
) {
  for (const key of keys) {
    const value = record[key];

    if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim()) {
      return value;
    }
  }

  return fallback;
}

function readFirstNumber(
  record: Record<string, unknown>,
  keys: string[],
  fallback = 0
) {
  for (const key of keys) {
    const value = record[key];

    if (typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value)) {
      return value;
    }

    if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim()) {
      const parsed = Number(value);
      if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
    }
  }

  return fallback;
}

function normalizeProject(project: Project) {
  const record = asRecord(project);

  return {
    raw: project,
    id: readFirstString(record, ["id", "projectId"], crypto.randomUUID()),
    companyName: readFirstString(
      record,
      ["companyName", "company", "clientName", "customerName"],
      "Unnamed Company"
    ),
    storeBranch: readFirstString(
      record,
      ["storeBranch", "branch", "store", "shop"],
      ""
    ),
    location: readFirstString(record, ["location", "site", "city"], ""),
    description: readFirstString(
      record,
      ["description", "workDescription", "scope", "work"],
      ""
    ),
    category: readFirstString(record, ["category", "workCategory"], "Other"),
    quotationNo: readFirstString(
      record,
      ["quotationNo", "quotationNumber", "quoteNo"],
      ""
    ),
    woNo: readFirstString(record, ["woNo", "workOrderNo", "workOrder"], ""),
    value: readFirstNumber(record, ["value", "projectValue", "amount"], 0),
    startDate: readFirstString(record, ["startDate"], ""),
    expectedCompletion: readFirstString(
      record,
      ["expectedCompletion", "expectedCompletionDate"],
      ""
    ),
    actualCompletion: readFirstString(
      record,
      ["actualCompletion", "actualCompletionDate"],
      ""
    ),
    status: readFirstString(record, ["status"], "upcoming") as ProjectStatus,
    completion: readFirstNumber(
      record,
      ["completion", "completionPercentage", "progress"],
      0
    ),
    remarks: readFirstString(record, ["remarks", "notes"], ""),
  };
}

function createPatchedProject(
  project: Project,
  patch: Partial<ReturnType<typeof normalizeProject>>
): Project {
  const record = asRecord(project);

  return {
    ...record,

    id: patch.id ?? readFirstString(record, ["id", "projectId"], crypto.randomUUID()),

    companyName:
      patch.companyName ??
      readFirstString(record, ["companyName", "company", "clientName"], ""),
    company:
      patch.companyName ??
      readFirstString(record, ["company", "companyName", "clientName"], ""),
    clientName:
      patch.companyName ??
      readFirstString(record, ["clientName", "companyName", "company"], ""),

    storeBranch:
      patch.storeBranch ??
      readFirstString(record, ["storeBranch", "branch", "store"], ""),
    branch:
      patch.storeBranch ??
      readFirstString(record, ["branch", "storeBranch", "store"], ""),

    location:
      patch.location ?? readFirstString(record, ["location", "site", "city"], ""),
    site:
      patch.location ?? readFirstString(record, ["site", "location", "city"], ""),

    description:
      patch.description ??
      readFirstString(record, ["description", "workDescription", "scope"], ""),
    workDescription:
      patch.description ??
      readFirstString(record, ["workDescription", "description", "scope"], ""),
    scope:
      patch.description ??
      readFirstString(record, ["scope", "description", "workDescription"], ""),

    category:
      patch.category ?? readFirstString(record, ["category", "workCategory"], ""),

    quotationNo:
      patch.quotationNo ??
      readFirstString(record, ["quotationNo", "quotationNumber", "quoteNo"], ""),
    quotationNumber:
      patch.quotationNo ??
      readFirstString(record, ["quotationNumber", "quotationNo", "quoteNo"], ""),

    woNo:
      patch.woNo ?? readFirstString(record, ["woNo", "workOrderNo"], ""),
    workOrderNo:
      patch.woNo ?? readFirstString(record, ["workOrderNo", "woNo"], ""),

    value: patch.value ?? readFirstNumber(record, ["value", "projectValue"], 0),
    projectValue:
      patch.value ?? readFirstNumber(record, ["projectValue", "value"], 0),

    startDate: patch.startDate ?? readFirstString(record, ["startDate"], ""),

    expectedCompletion:
      patch.expectedCompletion ??
      readFirstString(record, ["expectedCompletion", "expectedCompletionDate"], ""),
    expectedCompletionDate:
      patch.expectedCompletion ??
      readFirstString(record, ["expectedCompletionDate", "expectedCompletion"], ""),

    actualCompletion:
      patch.actualCompletion ??
      readFirstString(record, ["actualCompletion", "actualCompletionDate"], ""),
    actualCompletionDate:
      patch.actualCompletion ??
      readFirstString(record, ["actualCompletionDate", "actualCompletion"], ""),

    status: patch.status ?? readFirstString(record, ["status"], "upcoming"),

    completion:
      patch.completion ??
      readFirstNumber(record, ["completion", "completionPercentage"], 0),
    completionPercentage:
      patch.completion ??
      readFirstNumber(record, ["completionPercentage", "completion"], 0),

    remarks: patch.remarks ?? readFirstString(record, ["remarks", "notes"], ""),
    notes: patch.remarks ?? readFirstString(record, ["notes", "remarks"], ""),
  } as unknown as Project;
}

function clampProgress(value: number) {
  return Math.min(Math.max(value, 0), 100);
}

export function ProjectsScreen() {
  const {
    data,
    syncState,
    updateProject,
    updateProjectStatus,
    deleteRecord,
  } = useBusinessData();

  const [query, setQuery] = useState("");
  const [status, setStatus] = useState("all");
  const [category, setCategory] = useState("all");

  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState("");
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState<ReturnType<typeof normalizeProject> | null>(
    null
  );

  const projects = useMemo(() => {
    return data.projects.map(normalizeProject);
  }, [data.projects]);

  const categories = useMemo(() => {
    return Array.from(
      new Set(projects.map((project) => project.category).filter(Boolean))
    );
  }, [projects]);

  const filteredProjects = useMemo(() => {
    const normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();

    return projects.filter((project) => {
      const target = [
        project.id,
        project.companyName,
        project.storeBranch,
        project.location,
        project.description,
        project.category,
        project.quotationNo,
        project.woNo,
        project.status,
        project.remarks,
      ]
        .join(" ")
        .toLowerCase();

      const matchesQuery = !normalizedQuery || target.includes(normalizedQuery);
      const matchesStatus = status === "all" || project.status === status;
      const matchesCategory = category === "all" || project.category === category;

      return matchesQuery && matchesStatus && matchesCategory;
    });
  }, [category, projects, query, status]);

  const stats = useMemo(() => {
    const totalValue = projects.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.value, 0);
    const completed = projects.filter((item) => item.status === "completed").length;
    const inProgress = projects.filter((item) => item.status === "in-progress").length;
    const onHold = projects.filter((item) => item.status === "on-hold").length;

    return [
      {
        label: "Total Projects",
        value: projects.length.toString(),
        icon: BriefcaseBusiness,
      },
      {
        label: "In Progress",
        value: inProgress.toString(),
        icon: Clock3,
      },
      {
        label: "Completed",
        value: completed.toString(),
        icon: CheckCircle2,
      },
      {
        label: "On Hold",
        value: onHold.toString(),
        icon: PauseCircle,
      },
      {
        label: "Total Work Value",
        value: money(totalValue),
        icon: BriefcaseBusiness,
      },
    ];
  }, [projects]);

  function startEdit(project: ReturnType<typeof normalizeProject>) {
    setEditingId(project.id);
    setDraft(project);
  }

  function cancelEdit() {
    setEditingId("");
    setDraft(null);
  }

  async function saveEdit() {
    if (!draft) return;

    const original = data.projects.find((project) => {
      return normalizeProject(project).id === draft.id;
    });

    if (!original) return;

    const updated = createPatchedProject(original, draft);

    await updateProject(updated);

    setEditingId("");
    setDraft(null);
  }

  async function handleStatusChange(
    project: ReturnType<typeof normalizeProject>,
    nextStatus: string
  ) {
    await updateProjectStatus(project.id, nextStatus as ProjectStatus);
  }

  async function handleDelete(project: ReturnType<typeof normalizeProject>) {
    const confirmed = window.confirm(
      `Delete project "${project.id}" for "${project.companyName}"?`
    );

    if (!confirmed) return;

    await deleteRecord("projects", project.id);
  }

  function updateDraft<TKey extends keyof ReturnType<typeof normalizeProject>>(
    key: TKey,
    value: ReturnType<typeof normalizeProject>[TKey]
  ) {
    setDraft((current) => {
      if (!current) return current;

      return {
        ...current,
        [key]: value,
      };
    });
  }

  return (
    <>
      <PageHeader
        title="Projects"
        description={`Manage project register with inline status changes, quick edits, delete, search, and filtering. Cloud: ${syncState}.`}
        actions={
          <Link className="button button--primary" href={routes.newProject}>
            <Plus size={16} />
            New Project
          </Link>
        }
      />

      <section className="projects-overview-grid">
        {stats.map((item) => {
          const Icon = item.icon;

          return (
            <article className="project-stat-card card" key={item.label}>
              <div className="project-stat-card__icon">
                <Icon size={22} />
              </div>

              <div>
                <span>{item.label}</span>
                <strong>{item.value}</strong>
              </div>
            </article>
          );
        })}
      </section>

      <section className="card table-toolbar projects-toolbar">
        <label className="toolbar-search">
          <Search size={17} />
          <input
            value={query}
            onChange={(event) => setQuery(event.target.value)}
            placeholder="Search project, company, location, quotation, WO..."
          />
        </label>

        <select
          className="select"
          value={status}
          onChange={(event) => setStatus(event.target.value)}
        >
          <option value="all">All Status</option>
          {projectStatusOptions.map((item) => (
            <option key={item.value} value={item.value}>
              {item.label}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>

        <select
          className="select"
          value={category}
          onChange={(event) => setCategory(event.target.value)}
        >
          <option value="all">All Categories</option>

          {categories.map((item) => (
            <option key={item} value={item}>
              {item}
            </option>
          ))}

          {categoryOptions
            .filter((item) => !categories.includes(item))
            .map((item) => (
              <option key={item} value={item}>
                {item}
              </option>
            ))}
        </select>
      </section>

      <section className="card projects-table-card">
        <div className="projects-table-header">
          <div>
            <h2>Project Register</h2>
            <p>
              Showing {filteredProjects.length} of {projects.length} projects.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="projects-table-header__hint">
            Use status dropdowns directly inside rows.
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="table-wrap projects-table-wrap">
          <table className="data-table projects-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Project ID</th>
                <th>Company</th>
                <th>Branch</th>
                <th>Location</th>
                <th>Work Description</th>
                <th>Category</th>
                <th>Quotation</th>
                <th>WO No</th>
                <th>Value</th>
                <th>Start</th>
                <th>Expected</th>
                <th>Status</th>
                <th>Completion</th>
                <th>Remarks</th>
                <th>Actions</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>

            <tbody>
              {filteredProjects.length ? (
                filteredProjects.map((project) => {
                  const isEditing = editingId === project.id && draft;

                  return (
                    <tr key={project.id}>
                      <td className="strong-cell">{project.id}</td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            value={draft.companyName}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("companyName", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          <strong>{project.companyName}</strong>
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            value={draft.storeBranch}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("storeBranch", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          project.storeBranch || "—"
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            value={draft.location}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("location", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          project.location || "—"
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input inline-input--wide"
                            value={draft.description}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("description", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          <span className="description-cell">
                            {project.description || "—"}
                          </span>
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <select
                            className="inline-select"
                            value={draft.category}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("category", event.target.value)
                            }
                          >
                            {categoryOptions.map((item) => (
                              <option key={item}>{item}</option>
                            ))}
                          </select>
                        ) : (
                          project.category || "—"
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            value={draft.quotationNo}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("quotationNo", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          project.quotationNo || "—"
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            value={draft.woNo}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("woNo", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          project.woNo || "—"
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td className="money-cell">
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            type="number"
                            value={draft.value}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft(
                                "value",
                                Number(event.target.value || 0)
                              )
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          money(project.value)
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            type="date"
                            value={draft.startDate}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("startDate", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          project.startDate || "—"
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            type="date"
                            value={draft.expectedCompletion}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("expectedCompletion", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          project.expectedCompletion || "—"
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        <select
                          className="inline-select status-inline-select"
                          value={isEditing ? draft.status : project.status}
                          onChange={(event) => {
                            if (isEditing) {
                              updateDraft(
                                "status",
                                event.target.value as ProjectStatus
                              );
                              return;
                            }

                            void handleStatusChange(project, event.target.value);
                          }}
                        >
                          {projectStatusOptions.map((item) => (
                            <option key={item.value} value={item.value}>
                              {item.label}
                            </option>
                          ))}
                        </select>

                        {!isEditing ? (
                          <div className="status-under-select">
                            <StatusBadge value={project.status} />
                          </div>
                        ) : null}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input"
                            type="number"
                            min="0"
                            max="100"
                            value={draft.completion}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft(
                                "completion",
                                Number(event.target.value || 0)
                              )
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          <div className="progress-cell">
                            <div>
                              <span
                                style={{
                                  width: `${clampProgress(project.completion)}%`,
                                }}
                              />
                            </div>
                            <small>{project.completion}%</small>
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            className="inline-input inline-input--wide"
                            value={draft.remarks}
                            onChange={(event) =>
                              updateDraft("remarks", event.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        ) : (
                          project.remarks || "—"
                        )}
                      </td>

                      <td>
                        <div className="row-actions">
                          {isEditing ? (
                            <>
                              <button
                                className="icon-button icon-button--success"
                                type="button"
                                onClick={() => void saveEdit()}
                                title="Save"
                              >
                                <Check size={17} />
                              </button>

                              <button
                                className="icon-button"
                                type="button"
                                onClick={cancelEdit}
                                title="Cancel"
                              >
                                <X size={17} />
                              </button>
                            </>
                          ) : (
                            <>
                              <button
                                className="icon-button"
                                type="button"
                                onClick={() => startEdit(project)}
                                title="Quick edit"
                              >
                                <Edit3 size={17} />
                              </button>

                              <button
                                className="icon-button icon-button--danger"
                                type="button"
                                onClick={() => void handleDelete(project)}
                                title="Delete"
                              >
                                <Trash2 size={17} />
                              </button>
                            </>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  );
                })
              ) : (
                <EmptyTableRow
                  columns={15}
                  message="No projects found. Click New Project or import your old Excel workbook."
                />
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </section>
    </>
  );
}

Now append this CSS at the bottom of:

src/app/globals.css
CSS
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Projects Screen - Full width professional layout                           */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.projects-overview-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
}

.project-stat-card {
  min-height: 132px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 18px;
}

.project-stat-card__icon {
  display: flex;
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 17px;
  background: #ecfdf5;
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.project-stat-card span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.project-stat-card strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 6px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 28px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
}

.projects-toolbar {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(420px, 1fr) 230px 260px;
}

.projects-table-card {
  padding: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.projects-table-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 18px;
  padding: 24px 24px 18px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.projects-table-header h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 24px;
  line-height: 1.2;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.projects-table-header p {
  margin-top: 5px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.projects-table-header__hint {
  border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  padding: 9px 14px;
  color: #166534;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 900;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.projects-table-wrap {
  max-height: calc(100vh - 390px);
  min-height: 420px;
}

.projects-table {
  min-width: 1680px;
}

.projects-table th {
  position: sticky;
  z-index: 2;
  top: 0;
}

.strong-cell {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-weight: 950 !important;
}

.money-cell {
  color: var(--emerald-dark) !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.description-cell {
  display: block;
  max-width: 320px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.status-inline-select {
  min-width: 160px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.status-under-select {
  margin-top: 8px;
}

@media (max-width: 1400px) {
  .projects-overview-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .projects-overview-grid,
  .projects-toolbar {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .projects-table-header {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .projects-table-header__hint {
    white-space: normal;
  }

  .projects-table-wrap {
    max-height: none;
  }
}

This improves the Projects page itself, not just global font scaling.

Reply next and I’ll give the next complete file:

src/presentation/features/export/export-screen.tsx

You said:

full code of css file

ChatGPT said:

Replace this file completely:

src/app/globals.css

With this full code:

CSS
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Base                                                                       */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

:root {
  --navy: #0f172a;
  --navy-soft: #162033;
  --muted: #64748b;
  --border: #e2e8f0;
  --surface: #f8fafc;
  --white: #ffffff;

  --emerald: #10b981;
  --emerald-dark: #047857;
  --emerald-soft: #ecfdf5;

  --red: #ef4444;
  --red-dark: #991b1b;
  --red-soft: #fef2f2;

  --amber: #f59e0b;
  --amber-dark: #92400e;
  --amber-soft: #fef3c7;

  --blue: #0ea5e9;
  --blue-dark: #075985;
  --blue-soft: #e0f2fe;

  --shadow-soft:
    0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04),
    0 8px 24px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04);
  --shadow-modal:
    0 20px 25px -5px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.14),
    0 8px 10px -6px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.1);
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-height: 100%;
  font-size: 16px;
}

body {
  min-height: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--navy);
  font-family:
    Inter,
    ui-sans-serif,
    system-ui,
    -apple-system,
    BlinkMacSystemFont,
    "Segoe UI",
    sans-serif;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
}

button {
  cursor: pointer;
}

button:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

svg {
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

::selection {
  background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.24);
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* App Layout                                                                 */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.app-frame {
  min-height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  background: var(--surface);
}

.app-main {
  min-height: 100vh;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.app-content {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  flex: 1;
  padding: 28px;
  display: grid;
  gap: 22px;
}

.sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  height: 100vh;
  width: 300px;
  min-width: 300px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow-y: auto;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgb(16 185 129 / 0.16), transparent 32%),
    var(--navy);
  padding: 24px 18px;
  color: #e2e8f0;
}

.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 0;
}

.sidebar__brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}

.sidebar__close {
  display: none;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sidebar__close svg {
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
}

.sidebar__quick-actions {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  margin: 18px 0 22px;
}

.sidebar__primary {
  min-height: 46px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: var(--emerald);
  padding: 12px 14px;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 850;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    transform 150ms ease;
}

.sidebar__primary:hover {
  background: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.sidebar__primary:active {
  transform: scale(0.98);
}

.sidebar__primary--ghost {
  border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.14);
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06);
}

.sidebar__primary--ghost:hover {
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12);
}

.sidebar__nav {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
}

.sidebar__nav a,
.sidebar__settings {
  min-height: 46px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 11px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  color: #cbd5e1;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 750;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease;
}

.sidebar__nav a:hover,
.sidebar__settings:hover {
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.08);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sidebar__nav a.is-active,
.sidebar__settings.is-active {
  background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.16);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sidebar__nav svg,
.sidebar__settings svg,
.sidebar__primary svg {
  width: 19px;
  height: 19px;
}

.sidebar__footer {
  margin-top: auto;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  padding-top: 18px;
}

.sidebar-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 80;
  inset: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: rgb(15 23 42 / 0.42);
}
