/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Topbar                                                                     */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.topbar {
  min-height: 76px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 18px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 28px;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 40;
}

.topbar__left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  min-width: 260px;
}

.topbar__left strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.mobile-menu {
  display: none;
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 13px;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.mobile-menu svg {
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
}

.topbar__search-wrap {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 560px;
}

.topbar__search {
  min-height: 46px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 15px;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.topbar__search input {
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  outline: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.topbar__actions {
  margin-left: auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}

.topbar__actions > button:not(.profile-button),
.mobile-menu {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: #ffffff;
}

.topbar__actions > button:not(.profile-button) {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 13px;
  color: #475569;
}

.topbar__new,
.topbar__import {
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.profile-button {
  min-height: 44px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 7px 10px;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.profile-button span {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--emerald);
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Global Search                                                              */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.global-search-menu {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 70;
  top: calc(100% + 10px);
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-modal);
}

.global-search-menu button {
  width: 100%;
  display: grid;
  gap: 3px;
  border: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  text-align: left;
}

.global-search-menu button:hover {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.global-search-menu button span {
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 950;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}

.global-search-menu button strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.global-search-menu button small {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.global-search-empty {
  padding: 18px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.search-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 50;
  inset: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Reusable UI                                                                */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.button {
  min-height: 44px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 13px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 18px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 900;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    border-color 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease,
    transform 150ms ease;
}

.button:hover {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.button:active {
  transform: scale(0.98);
}

.button svg {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
}

.button--primary {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  background: var(--emerald);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.button--primary:hover {
  border-color: var(--emerald-dark);
  background: var(--emerald-dark);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.button--danger {
  border-color: var(--red);
  background: var(--red);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.button--danger:hover {
  border-color: var(--red-dark);
  background: var(--red-dark);
}

.select {
  min-height: 48px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 11px 14px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  outline: 0;
}

.select:focus {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgb(16 185 129 / 0.12);
}

.card {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 24px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
}

.card__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.card__header h2,
.card h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 22px;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
}

.card p {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.75;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.page-header {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 20px;
}

.page-header h1,
.page-title,
h1 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 34px !important;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
}

.page-header p {
  margin-top: 8px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.page-header__actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Sync Status                                                                */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.sync-pill {
  min-height: 34px;
  width: 100%;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06);
  color: #e2e8f0;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: capitalize;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    border-color 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease;
}

.sync-pill:hover {
  border-color: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.45);
  background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.14);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sync-pill:disabled {
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.sync-pill span {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #94a3b8;
}

.sync-pill--synced span {
  background: #22c55e;
}

.sync-pill--syncing span {
  background: #38bdf8;
}

.sync-pill--offline span {
  background: #f59e0b;
}

.sync-pill--error span {
  background: #ef4444;
}

.sync-state {
  margin-top: 18px;
  width: fit-content;
  display: inline-flex;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 7px 12px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: capitalize;
}

.sync-state--synced {
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #166534;
}

.sync-state--syncing {
  background: var(--blue-soft);
  color: var(--blue-dark);
}

.sync-state--offline {
  background: var(--amber-soft);
  color: var(--amber-dark);
}

.sync-state--error {
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Dashboard                                                                  */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
}

.metric-card {
  min-height: 150px;
  padding: 22px;
}

.metric-card__top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
}

.metric-card__icon {
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.metric-card__icon svg {
  width: 19px;
  height: 19px;
}

.metric-card__trend {
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.metric-card p {
  margin-top: 18px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.metric-card strong {
  margin-top: 10px;
  display: block;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 31px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
}

.grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 22px;
}

.chart {
  min-height: 280px;
}

.chart svg {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 280px;
}

.donut-wrap {
  min-height: 280px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.donut {
  width: 210px;
  height: 210px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.donut span {
  width: 128px;
  height: 128px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--border);
}

.donut strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 30px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

.donut small {
  margin-top: -28px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Forms                                                                      */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.record-form {
  display: grid;
  gap: 22px;
}

.form-section header {
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.form-section h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 22px;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
}

.form-section p {
  margin-top: 4px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.form-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
}

.field {
  display: grid;
  gap: 9px;
}

.field--full {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.field span {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.field input,
.field select,
.field textarea {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 48px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 11px 14px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  outline: none;
  transition:
    border-color 150ms ease,
    box-shadow 150ms ease,
    background 150ms ease;
}

.field textarea {
  min-height: 120px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.field input:focus,
.field select:focus,
.field textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgb(16 185 129 / 0.12);
}

.field input:disabled {
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #64748b;
}

.form-actions {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 12px;
}

.form-message {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 10px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 750;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.form-message--error {
  border: 1px solid #fecaca;
  background: var(--red-soft);
  color: var(--red-dark);
}

.form-message--success {
  border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  color: #166534;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Tables                                                                     */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.table-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.data-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: separate;
  border-spacing: 0;
  font-size: 15px;
}

.data-table th {
  height: 52px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #334155;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-align: left;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.data-table td {
  min-height: 58px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  color: #1e293b;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.data-table tbody tr:hover {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.empty-state,
.data-table .empty-row td {
  min-height: 220px;
  padding: 50px 20px !important;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.table-toolbar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(360px, 1fr) 210px 240px;
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 18px;
}

.toolbar-search {
  min-height: 48px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 15px;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.toolbar-search input {
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--navy);
  outline: none;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.inline-input,
.inline-select {
  min-height: 42px;
  min-width: 150px;
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 8px 11px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 800;
  outline: none;
  transition:
    border-color 150ms ease,
    box-shadow 150ms ease;
}

.inline-input--wide {
  min-width: 260px;
}

.inline-input:focus,
.inline-select:focus {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(16 185 129 / 0.12);
}

.inline-select {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.progress-cell {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.progress-cell > div {
  width: 120px;
  height: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #e2e8f0;
}

.progress-cell > div > span {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: inherit;
  background: var(--emerald);
}

.progress-cell small {
  min-width: 36px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.row-actions {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.icon-button {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #475569;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    border-color 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease,
    transform 150ms ease;
}

.icon-button:hover {
  border-color: #cbd5e1;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.icon-button:active {
  transform: scale(0.96);
}

.icon-button--success {
  border-color: #bbf7d0;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  color: #166534;
}

.icon-button--success:hover {
  border-color: #86efac;
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #14532d;
}

.icon-button--danger {
  border-color: #fecaca;
  background: #fef2f2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

.icon-button--danger:hover {
  border-color: #fca5a5;
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #7f1d1d;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Badges                                                                     */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.status-badge,
.badge {
  min-height: 28px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 5px 10px;
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #334155;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 950;
  text-transform: capitalize;
}

.status-badge--paid,
.badge--paid,
.status-badge--completed,
.badge--completed,
.status-badge--approved,
.badge--approved {
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #166534;
}

.status-badge--pending,
.badge--pending,
.status-badge--upcoming,
.badge--upcoming,
.status-badge--draft,
.badge--draft {
  background: #fef3c7;
  color: #92400e;
}

.status-badge--partial,
.badge--partial,
.status-badge--in-progress,
.badge--in-progress,
.status-badge--sent,
.badge--sent {
  background: #e0f2fe;
  color: #075985;
}

.status-badge--overdue,
.badge--overdue,
.status-badge--cancelled,
.badge--cancelled,
.status-badge--rejected,
.badge--rejected {
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

.status-badge--on-hold,
.badge--on-hold {
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #475569;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Projects Screen                                                            */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.projects-overview-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
}

.project-stat-card {
  min-height: 132px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 18px;
}

.project-stat-card__icon {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 17px;
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.project-stat-card span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.project-stat-card strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 6px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 28px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
}

.projects-toolbar {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(420px, 1fr) 230px 260px;
}

.projects-table-card {
  padding: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.projects-table-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 18px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 24px 24px 18px;
}

.projects-table-header h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 24px;
  line-height: 1.2;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.projects-table-header p {
  margin-top: 5px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.projects-table-header__hint {
  border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  padding: 9px 14px;
  color: #166534;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 950;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.projects-table-wrap {
  max-height: calc(100vh - 390px);
  min-height: 420px;
}

.projects-table {
  min-width: 1680px;
}

.projects-table th {
  position: sticky;
  z-index: 2;
  top: 0;
}

.strong-cell {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-weight: 950 !important;
}

.money-cell {
  color: var(--emerald-dark) !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.description-cell {
  display: block;
  max-width: 320px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.status-inline-select {
  min-width: 160px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.status-under-select {
  margin-top: 8px;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Excel Import / Export                                                      */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.file-input {
  display: none;
}

.import-panel {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.1fr) minmax(420px, 560px);
  gap: 26px;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.import-panel--hero {
  border-color: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.24);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgb(16 185 129 / 0.09), transparent 34%),
    #ffffff;
}

.import-panel__content {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

.import-panel__content h2 {
  margin-top: 14px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

.import-panel__content p {
  margin-top: 10px;
  max-width: 660px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.75;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.export-card__icon {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.export-card__icon svg {
  width: 25px;
  height: 25px;
}

.drop-zone {
  min-height: 300px;
  border: 2px dashed #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 24px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 34px;
  color: #64748b;
  text-align: center;
  transition:
    border-color 160ms ease,
    background 160ms ease,
    color 160ms ease,
    transform 160ms ease;
}

.drop-zone:hover {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.drop-zone--active {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  background: #d1fae5;
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  transform: scale(1.01);
}

.drop-zone--busy {
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.drop-zone strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 19px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

.drop-zone span {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.export-control-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 18px;
}

.export-control-panel__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
}

.export-control-panel__header h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

.export-control-panel__header p {
  margin-top: 4px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.export-filters {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(360px, 1fr) 260px 240px;
  gap: 12px;
}

.export-summary-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.export-summary-grid > div {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  padding: 18px;
}

.export-summary-grid span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.export-summary-grid strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 8px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 950;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Animation                                                                  */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.spin {
  animation: spin 850ms linear infinite;
}

@keyframes spin {
  to {
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Responsive                                                                 */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

@media (max-width: 1400px) {
  .projects-overview-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1280px) {
  .metrics {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  }

  .grid-2 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .import-panel {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .topbar__new {
    display: none;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .export-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .app-content {
    padding: 22px;
  }

  .page-header {
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .page-header h1,
  .page-title,
  h1 {
    font-size: 30px !important;
  }

  .form-grid,
  .table-toolbar,
  .projects-toolbar,
  .export-filters {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .projects-table-header,
  .export-control-panel__header {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .projects-table-header__hint {
    white-space: normal;
  }

  .projects-table-wrap {
    max-height: none;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .sidebar {
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 90;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    transition: transform 180ms ease;
  }

  .sidebar--open {
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .sidebar__close {
    display: inline-flex;
  }

  .mobile-menu {
    display: inline-flex;
  }

  .topbar {
    min-height: 68px;
    padding: 0 16px;
  }

  .topbar__left {
    min-width: auto;
  }

  .topbar__left strong {
    font-size: 17px;
  }

  .topbar__search-wrap,
  .topbar__import {
    display: none;
  }

  .app-content {
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .card {
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .page-header h1,
  .page-title,
  h1 {
    font-size: 27px !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .metrics,
  .projects-overview-grid,
  .export-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .drop-zone {
    min-height: 200px;
  }

  .form-actions {
    flex-direction: column-reverse;
  }

  .form-actions .button {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

Next file should be:

src/presentation/features/export/export-screen.tsx

Reply next when ready.


You said:

next

ChatGPT said:

Replace this file:

src/presentation/features/export/export-screen.tsx

With this complete code:

TypeScript
"use client";

import {
  AlertCircle,
  CheckCircle2,
  Download,
  FileSpreadsheet,
  LoaderCircle,
  Search,
  UploadCloud,
} from "lucide-react";
import { useMemo, useRef, useState, type DragEvent } from "react";
import { exportBusinessWorkbook } from "@/application/services/workbook-export";
import { PageHeader } from "@/presentation/components/ui";
import { useBusinessData } from "@/presentation/providers/business-data-provider";

const exportOptions = [
  {
    key: "full",
    name: "Full Workbook",
    type: "all",
    description: "Export all live clients, projects, quotations, and invoices.",
  },
  {
    key: "clients",
    name: "Company Master",
    type: "clients",
    description: "Export client/company master records only.",
  },
  {
    key: "projects",
    name: "Project Register",
    type: "projects",
    description: "Export filtered project register records.",
  },
  {
    key: "quotations",
    name: "Quotation Tracking",
    type: "quotations",
    description: "Export filtered quotation pipeline records.",
  },
  {
    key: "invoices",
    name: "Invoice & Payment",
    type: "invoices",
    description: "Export filtered invoice and payment records.",
  },
  {
    key: "pending",
    name: "Pending Payments",
    type: "pending",
    description: "Export pending, partial, and overdue payment records.",
  },
] as const;

type ExportType = (typeof exportOptions)[number]["type"];

function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null) {
    return value as Record<string, unknown>;
  }

  return {};
}

function readFirstString(
  record: Record<string, unknown>,
  keys: string[],
  fallback = ""
) {
  for (const key of keys) {
    const value = record[key];

    if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim()) {
      return value;
    }
  }

  return fallback;
}

function searchableText(value: unknown) {
  const record = asRecord(value);

  return Object.values(record)
    .filter((item) => typeof item === "string" || typeof item === "number")
    .join(" ")
    .toLowerCase();
}

function getStatus(value: unknown) {
  const record = asRecord(value);

  return readFirstString(
    record,
    ["status", "paymentStatus", "projectStatus", "quotationStatus"],
    ""
  ).toLowerCase();
}

function isPendingInvoice(value: unknown) {
  const status = getStatus(value);

  return ["pending", "partial", "overdue"].includes(status);
}

function createExportFileName(name: string) {
  const date = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  return `${name.replaceAll(" ", "_")}_${date}.xlsx`;
}

export function ExportScreen() {
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement | null>(null);

  const { data, importFile, syncState, lastError } = useBusinessData();

  const [dragging, setDragging] = useState(false);
  const [importing, setImporting] = useState(false);
  const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(false);

  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [exportType, setExportType] = useState<ExportType>("all");
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("all");

  const [error, setError] = useState("");
  const [success, setSuccess] = useState("");

  const normalizedSearch = search.trim().toLowerCase();

  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {
    const filterCollection = <TItem,>(items: TItem[]) => {
      return items.filter((item) => {
        const matchesSearch =
          !normalizedSearch || searchableText(item).includes(normalizedSearch);

        const matchesStatus =
          statusFilter === "all" || getStatus(item) === statusFilter;

        return matchesSearch && matchesStatus;
      });
    };

    const clients = data.clients.filter((item) => {
      if (!normalizedSearch) return true;
      return searchableText(item).includes(normalizedSearch);
    });

    const projects = filterCollection(data.projects);
    const quotations = filterCollection(data.quotations);
    const invoices = filterCollection(data.invoices);
    const pendingInvoices = invoices.filter(isPendingInvoice);

    return {
      clients,
      projects,
      quotations,
      invoices: exportType === "pending" ? pendingInvoices : invoices,
    };
  }, [
    data.clients,
    data.invoices,
    data.projects,
    data.quotations,
    exportType,
    normalizedSearch,
    statusFilter,
  ]);

  const selectedExport = useMemo(() => {
    return exportOptions.find((item) => item.type === exportType) ?? exportOptions[0];
  }, [exportType]);

  const recordCount = useMemo(() => {
    if (exportType === "clients") return filteredData.clients.length;
    if (exportType === "projects") return filteredData.projects.length;
    if (exportType === "quotations") return filteredData.quotations.length;
    if (exportType === "invoices") return filteredData.invoices.length;
    if (exportType === "pending") return filteredData.invoices.length;

    return (
      filteredData.clients.length +
      filteredData.projects.length +
      filteredData.quotations.length +
      filteredData.invoices.length
    );
  }, [exportType, filteredData]);

  const previewRows = useMemo(() => {
    if (exportType === "clients") return filteredData.clients.slice(0, 8);
    if (exportType === "projects") return filteredData.projects.slice(0, 8);
    if (exportType === "quotations") return filteredData.quotations.slice(0, 8);
    if (exportType === "invoices" || exportType === "pending") {
      return filteredData.invoices.slice(0, 8);
    }

    return [
      ...filteredData.clients.slice(0, 2),
      ...filteredData.projects.slice(0, 2),
      ...filteredData.quotations.slice(0, 2),
      ...filteredData.invoices.slice(0, 2),
    ];
  }, [exportType, filteredData]);

  function openFilePicker() {
    if (importing) return;
    fileInputRef.current?.click();
  }

  function validateExcelFile(file: File) {
    const lowerName = file.name.toLowerCase();

    return [".xlsx", ".xls", ".xlsm", ".xlsb", ".ods", ".csv"].some((extension) =>
      lowerName.endsWith(extension)
    );
  }

  async function handleImport(file?: File) {
    if (!file || importing) return;

    setError("");
    setSuccess("");

    if (!validateExcelFile(file)) {
      setError("Invalid file. Upload .xlsx, .xls, .xlsm, .xlsb, .ods, or .csv.");
      return;
    }

    setImporting(true);

    try {
      const result = await importFile(file);

      const sheetMatches = result.sheetMatches.length
        ? result.sheetMatches
            .map((sheet) => `${sheet.sheet}: ${sheet.records}`)
            .join(" | ")
        : "No mapped sheets found.";

      const warningText = result.warnings.length
        ? ` Warnings: ${result.warnings.join(" ")}`
        : "";

      setSuccess(
        `Imported successfully. Clients: ${result.clients.length}, Projects: ${result.projects.length}, Quotations: ${result.quotations.length}, Invoices: ${result.invoices.length}. ${sheetMatches}.${warningText}`
      );
    } catch (caughtError) {
      setError(
        caughtError instanceof Error
          ? caughtError.message
          : "Excel import failed. Please try again."
      );
    } finally {
      setImporting(false);
      setDragging(false);
    }
  }

  function handleDrop(event: DragEvent<HTMLDivElement>) {
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();

    if (importing) return;

    const file = event.dataTransfer.files?.[0];

    if (!file) {
      setDragging(false);
      setError("No Excel file detected.");
      return;
    }

    void handleImport(file);
  }

  async function handleExport() {
    if (exporting) return;

    setError("");
    setSuccess("");

    if (recordCount === 0) {
      setError("No records match your current export filters.");
      return;
    }

    setExporting(true);

    try {
      await exportBusinessWorkbook(
        {
          clients:
            exportType === "all" || exportType === "clients"
              ? filteredData.clients
              : [],
          projects:
            exportType === "all" || exportType === "projects"
              ? filteredData.projects
              : [],
          quotations:
            exportType === "all" || exportType === "quotations"
              ? filteredData.quotations
              : [],
          invoices:
            exportType === "all" ||
            exportType === "invoices" ||
            exportType === "pending"
              ? filteredData.invoices
              : [],
        },
        createExportFileName(selectedExport.name)
      );

      setSuccess(
        `${selectedExport.name} exported successfully. Records exported: ${recordCount}.`
      );
    } catch (caughtError) {
      setError(
        caughtError instanceof Error
          ? caughtError.message
          : "Excel export failed. Please retry."
      );
    } finally {
      setExporting(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <>
      <PageHeader
        title="Excel Import / Export"
        description="Import old workbook data and export exactly what you need from one dedicated export center."
        actions={
          <button
            className="button button--primary"
            type="button"
            onClick={openFilePicker}
            disabled={importing}
          >
            {importing ? (
              <LoaderCircle className="spin" size={16} />
            ) : (
              <UploadCloud size={16} />
            )}
            Import Excel
          </button>
        }
      />

      <input
        ref={fileInputRef}
        className="file-input"
        type="file"
        accept=".xlsx,.xls,.xlsm,.xlsb,.ods,.csv"
        disabled={importing}
        onChange={(event) => {
          const file = event.target.files?.[0];
          event.target.value = "";
          void handleImport(file);
        }}
      />

      <section className="card import-panel import-panel--hero">
        <div className="import-panel__content">
          <div className="export-card__icon">
            <FileSpreadsheet size={25} />
          </div>

          <h2>Import old Excel workbook</h2>

          <p>
            Click or drag your Excel file here. The app parses your workbook,
            updates the dashboard instantly, stores data locally, and syncs with
            Firebase in the background.
          </p>

          <div className={`sync-state sync-state--${syncState}`}>
            Cloud sync: {syncState}
            {lastError ? ` — ${lastError}` : ""}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div
          className={[
            "drop-zone",
            dragging ? "drop-zone--active" : "",
            importing ? "drop-zone--busy" : "",
          ].join(" ")}
          role="button"
          tabIndex={0}
          aria-label="Click or drop Excel workbook"
          onClick={openFilePicker}
          onKeyDown={(event) => {
            if ((event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") && !importing) {
              event.preventDefault();
              openFilePicker();
            }
          }}
          onDragEnter={(event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            setDragging(true);
          }}
          onDragOver={(event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            event.dataTransfer.dropEffect = "copy";
            setDragging(true);
          }}
          onDragLeave={(event) => {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();

            const relatedTarget = event.relatedTarget as Node | null;

            if (!relatedTarget || !event.currentTarget.contains(relatedTarget)) {
              setDragging(false);
            }
          }}
          onDrop={handleDrop}
        >
          {importing ? (
            <LoaderCircle className="spin" size={44} />
          ) : (
            <UploadCloud size={44} />
          )}

          <strong>
            {importing
              ? "Parsing workbook..."
              : dragging
                ? "Drop Excel file here"
                : "Click or drag Excel file here"}
          </strong>

          <span>Supports .xlsx, .xls, .xlsm, .xlsb, .ods, and .csv.</span>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="card export-control-panel">
        <div className="export-control-panel__header">
          <div>
            <h2>Export Center</h2>
            <p>
              Select a workbook section, search records, filter status, preview
              the matched records, then export.
            </p>
          </div>

          <button
            className="button button--primary"
            type="button"
            onClick={handleExport}
            disabled={exporting}
          >
            {exporting ? (
              <LoaderCircle className="spin" size={16} />
            ) : (
              <Download size={16} />
            )}
            {exporting ? "Exporting..." : "Export Selected"}
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="export-filters">
          <label className="toolbar-search">
            <Search size={17} />
            <input
              value={search}
              onChange={(event) => setSearch(event.target.value)}
              placeholder="Search company, project, invoice, quotation..."
            />
          </label>

          <select
            className="select"
            value={exportType}
            onChange={(event) => setExportType(event.target.value as ExportType)}
          >
            {exportOptions.map((item) => (
              <option key={item.key} value={item.type}>
                {item.name}
              </option>
            ))}
          </select>

          <select
            className="select"
            value={statusFilter}
            onChange={(event) => setStatusFilter(event.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="all">All Status</option>

            <option value="upcoming">Upcoming</option>
            <option value="in-progress">In Progress</option>
            <option value="on-hold">On Hold</option>
            <option value="completed">Completed</option>
            <option value="cancelled">Cancelled</option>

            <option value="draft">Draft</option>
            <option value="sent">Sent</option>
            <option value="approved">Approved</option>
            <option value="rejected">Rejected</option>
            <option value="expired">Expired</option>

            <option value="pending">Pending</option>
            <option value="partial">Partial</option>
            <option value="overdue">Overdue</option>
            <option value="paid">Paid</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div className="export-summary-grid">
          <div>
            <span>Clients</span>
            <strong>{filteredData.clients.length}</strong>
          </div>

          <div>
            <span>Projects</span>
            <strong>{filteredData.projects.length}</strong>
          </div>

          <div>
            <span>Quotations</span>
            <strong>{filteredData.quotations.length}</strong>
          </div>

          <div>
            <span>Invoices</span>
            <strong>{filteredData.invoices.length}</strong>
          </div>

          <div>
            <span>Export Records</span>
            <strong>{recordCount}</strong>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="export-preview">
          <div className="export-preview__header">
            <div>
              <h3>{selectedExport.name}</h3>
              <p>{selectedExport.description}</p>
            </div>

            <span>{recordCount} records matched</span>
          </div>

          <div className="table-wrap">
            <table className="data-table export-preview-table">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>Type</th>
                  <th>Primary</th>
                  <th>Secondary</th>
                  <th>Status</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>

              <tbody>
                {previewRows.length ? (
                  previewRows.map((row, index) => {
                    const record = asRecord(row);

                    const id = readFirstString(
                      record,
                      ["id", "projectId", "invoiceNo", "quotationNo"],
                      `ROW-${index + 1}`
                    );

                    const primary = readFirstString(
                      record,
                      [
                        "companyName",
                        "company",
                        "clientName",
                        "customerName",
                        "name",
                      ],
                      "Unnamed Record"
                    );

                    const secondary = readFirstString(
                      record,
                      [
                        "description",
                        "workDescription",
                        "scope",
                        "location",
                        "city",
                        "category",
                      ],
                      id
                    );

                    const status = getStatus(row) || "—";

                    return (
                      <tr key={`${id}-${index}`}>
                        <td>{selectedExport.name}</td>
                        <td>{primary}</td>
                        <td>{secondary}</td>
                        <td>{status}</td>
                      </tr>
                    );
                  })
                ) : (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan={4}>
                      No records match your current filters.
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {error ? (
        <div className="form-message form-message--error" role="alert">
          <AlertCircle size={16} />
          {error}
        </div>
      ) : null}

      {success ? (
        <div className="form-message form-message--success" role="status">
          <CheckCircle2 size={16} />
          {success}
        </div>
      ) : null}
    </>
  );
}

Also append this CSS at the bottom of:

src/app/globals.css
CSS
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Export Preview                                                             */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.export-preview {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 18px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #ffffff;
}

.export-preview__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: #f8fafc;
  padding: 18px;
}

.export-preview__header h3 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

.export-preview__header p {
  margin-top: 4px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.export-preview__header span {
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  padding: 8px 12px;
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 950;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.export-preview-table {
  min-width: 720px;
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .export-preview__header {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

This makes the export page properly usable:

Drag and drop import
Click import
Search before export
Filter status before export
Choose export type
Preview matched records
Export only selected/filtered data
No export buttons scattered across modules

Reply next and I’ll give the next complete file:

src/app/(protected)/excel-export/page.tsx

You said:

3Star Professional Workbook(1)
Unnamed: 0Unnamed: 1Unnamed: 2Unnamed: 3
3 Star Automatic Door & Maintenance Works
مؤسسة ليلى مقبول موسي حكمي للمقاولات العامة
CR No.: 5855372075 VAT No.: 312093484700003
1. you made the whole ui too much bigger now i have to scroll everything to reach everything 2.the export will not apear on any screen else then its own seperate screen in sidebar only import will be there at the top 3.You didnt match the exact design and formatting as the given template for the export excel i need that exact logo header everything but with the data changed fix the ui back to as it was but a tiny tiny large with bold texts

ChatGPT said:

Understood. We fix this in order:

  1. UI scale reset — not huge, only slightly larger/bolder.

  2. Topbar import only — no export outside the export page.

  3. Exact Excel template export — use your workbook as the master template and only replace data.

First file: CSS.

Replace this file completely:

src/app/globals.css

With this corrected compact-professional version:

CSS
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Base                                                                       */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

:root {
  --navy: #0f172a;
  --navy-soft: #162033;
  --muted: #64748b;
  --border: #e2e8f0;
  --surface: #f8fafc;
  --white: #ffffff;

  --emerald: #10b981;
  --emerald-dark: #047857;
  --emerald-soft: #ecfdf5;

  --red: #ef4444;
  --red-dark: #991b1b;
  --red-soft: #fef2f2;

  --amber: #f59e0b;
  --amber-dark: #92400e;
  --amber-soft: #fef3c7;

  --blue: #0ea5e9;
  --blue-dark: #075985;
  --blue-soft: #e0f2fe;

  --shadow-soft:
    0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04),
    0 8px 20px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.035);
  --shadow-modal:
    0 18px 24px -6px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.14),
    0 8px 10px -8px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.1);
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-height: 100%;
  font-size: 15px;
}

body {
  min-height: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  background: var(--surface);
  color: var(--navy);
  font-family:
    Inter,
    ui-sans-serif,
    system-ui,
    -apple-system,
    BlinkMacSystemFont,
    "Segoe UI",
    sans-serif;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
}

button {
  cursor: pointer;
}

button:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.68;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

svg {
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

::selection {
  background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.24);
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* App Layout                                                                 */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.app-frame {
  min-height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  background: var(--surface);
}

.app-main {
  min-height: 100vh;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.app-content {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  flex: 1;
  padding: 22px;
  display: grid;
  gap: 16px;
}

.sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  height: 100vh;
  width: 276px;
  min-width: 276px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow-y: auto;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgb(16 185 129 / 0.14), transparent 32%),
    var(--navy);
  padding: 18px 14px;
  color: #e2e8f0;
}

.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 0;
}

.sidebar__brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.sidebar__close {
  display: none;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sidebar__close svg {
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
}

.sidebar__quick-actions {
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
  margin: 14px 0 16px;
}

.sidebar__primary {
  min-height: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 9px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: var(--emerald);
  padding: 9px 12px;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 800;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    transform 150ms ease;
}

.sidebar__primary:hover {
  background: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.sidebar__primary:active {
  transform: scale(0.98);
}

.sidebar__primary--ghost {
  border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.14);
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06);
}

.sidebar__primary--ghost:hover {
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12);
}

.sidebar__nav {
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
}

.sidebar__nav a,
.sidebar__settings {
  min-height: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 9px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 9px 12px;
  color: #cbd5e1;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 720;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease;
}

.sidebar__nav a:hover,
.sidebar__settings:hover {
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.08);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sidebar__nav a.is-active,
.sidebar__settings.is-active {
  background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.16);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sidebar__nav svg,
.sidebar__settings svg,
.sidebar__primary svg {
  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;
}

.sidebar__footer {
  margin-top: auto;
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  padding-top: 14px;
}

.sidebar-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 80;
  inset: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: rgb(15 23 42 / 0.42);
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Topbar                                                                     */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.topbar {
  min-height: 64px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 22px;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 40;
}

.topbar__left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  min-width: 230px;
}

.topbar__left strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.mobile-menu {
  display: none;
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.mobile-menu svg {
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
}

.topbar__search-wrap {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 520px;
}

.topbar__search {
  min-height: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 9px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 13px;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.topbar__search input {
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  outline: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.topbar__actions {
  margin-left: auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.topbar__actions > button:not(.profile-button),
.mobile-menu {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: #ffffff;
}

.topbar__actions > button:not(.profile-button) {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 12px;
  color: #475569;
}

.topbar__import {
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.topbar__new {
  display: none;
}

.profile-button {
  min-height: 40px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 6px 9px;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.profile-button span {
  width: 29px;
  height: 29px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--emerald);
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Global Search                                                              */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.global-search-menu {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 70;
  top: calc(100% + 8px);
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-modal);
}

.global-search-menu button {
  width: 100%;
  display: grid;
  gap: 2px;
  border: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 11px 13px;
  text-align: left;
}

.global-search-menu button:hover {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.global-search-menu button span {
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}

.global-search-menu button strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.global-search-menu button small {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.global-search-empty {
  padding: 14px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.search-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 50;
  inset: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Reusable UI                                                                */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.button {
  min-height: 40px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 7px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 14px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 820;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    border-color 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease,
    transform 150ms ease;
}

.button:hover {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.button:active {
  transform: scale(0.98);
}

.button svg {
  width: 15px;
  height: 15px;
}

.button--primary {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  background: var(--emerald);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.button--primary:hover {
  border-color: var(--emerald-dark);
  background: var(--emerald-dark);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.button--danger {
  border-color: var(--red);
  background: var(--red);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.button--danger:hover {
  border-color: var(--red-dark);
  background: var(--red-dark);
}

.select {
  min-height: 42px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 9px 12px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 680;
  outline: 0;
}

.select:focus {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(16 185 129 / 0.12);
}

.card {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 18px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
}

.card__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.card__header h2,
.card h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

.card p {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14.5px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.page-header {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
}

.page-header h1,
.page-title,
h1 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 27px !important;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 930 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.page-header p {
  margin-top: 6px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14.5px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  font-weight: 620;
}

.page-header__actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Sync Status                                                                */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.sync-pill {
  min-height: 31px;
  width: 100%;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 7px;
  border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06);
  color: #e2e8f0;
  font-size: 11.5px;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: capitalize;
}

.sync-pill:hover {
  border-color: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.45);
  background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.14);
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sync-pill span {
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #94a3b8;
}

.sync-pill--synced span {
  background: #22c55e;
}

.sync-pill--syncing span {
  background: #38bdf8;
}

.sync-pill--offline span {
  background: #f59e0b;
}

.sync-pill--error span {
  background: #ef4444;
}

.sync-state {
  margin-top: 14px;
  width: fit-content;
  display: inline-flex;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  font-size: 11.5px;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: capitalize;
}

.sync-state--synced {
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #166534;
}

.sync-state--syncing {
  background: var(--blue-soft);
  color: var(--blue-dark);
}

.sync-state--offline {
  background: var(--amber-soft);
  color: var(--amber-dark);
}

.sync-state--error {
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Dashboard                                                                  */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(190px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.metric-card {
  min-height: 122px;
  padding: 17px;
}

.metric-card__top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
}

.metric-card__icon {
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.metric-card__icon svg {
  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;
}

.metric-card__trend {
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.metric-card p {
  margin-top: 14px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.metric-card strong {
  margin-top: 7px;
  display: block;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 25px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  font-weight: 930;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
}

.chart,
.donut-wrap {
  min-height: 230px;
}

.chart svg {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 230px;
}

.donut-wrap {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.donut {
  width: 175px;
  height: 175px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.donut span {
  width: 108px;
  height: 108px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--border);
}

.donut strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 25px;
  font-weight: 930;
}

.donut small {
  margin-top: -24px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Forms                                                                      */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.record-form {
  display: grid;
  gap: 16px;
}

.form-section header {
  margin-bottom: 17px;
}

.form-section h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

.form-section p {
  margin-top: 3px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.55;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.form-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.field {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
}

.field--full {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.field span {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 820;
}

.field input,
.field select,
.field textarea {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 42px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 9px 12px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 650;
  outline: none;
  transition:
    border-color 150ms ease,
    box-shadow 150ms ease,
    background 150ms ease;
}

.field textarea {
  min-height: 96px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.field input:focus,
.field select:focus,
.field textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(16 185 129 / 0.12);
}

.field input:disabled {
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #64748b;
}

.form-actions {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 10px;
}

.form-message {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 9px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.form-message--error {
  border: 1px solid #fecaca;
  background: var(--red-soft);
  color: var(--red-dark);
}

.form-message--success {
  border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  color: #166534;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Tables                                                                     */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.table-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.data-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: separate;
  border-spacing: 0;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.data-table th {
  height: 44px;
  padding: 11px 13px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #334155;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-align: left;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.data-table td {
  min-height: 48px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  padding: 11px 13px;
  color: #1e293b;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 640;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.data-table tbody tr:hover {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.empty-state,
.data-table .empty-row td {
  min-height: 160px;
  padding: 34px 16px !important;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.table-toolbar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(320px, 1fr) 190px 220px;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 14px;
}

.toolbar-search {
  min-height: 42px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 9px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 0 13px;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.toolbar-search input {
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--navy);
  outline: none;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.inline-input,
.inline-select {
  min-height: 36px;
  min-width: 130px;
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 7px 9px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  outline: none;
  transition:
    border-color 150ms ease,
    box-shadow 150ms ease;
}

.inline-input--wide {
  min-width: 220px;
}

.inline-input:focus,
.inline-select:focus {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(16 185 129 / 0.12);
}

.inline-select {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.progress-cell {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
}

.progress-cell > div {
  width: 95px;
  height: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #e2e8f0;
}

.progress-cell > div > span {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: inherit;
  background: var(--emerald);
}

.progress-cell small {
  min-width: 32px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.row-actions {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.icon-button {
  width: 34px;
  height: 34px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #475569;
  transition:
    background 150ms ease,
    border-color 150ms ease,
    color 150ms ease,
    transform 150ms ease;
}

.icon-button:hover {
  border-color: #cbd5e1;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: var(--navy);
}

.icon-button:active {
  transform: scale(0.96);
}

.icon-button--success {
  border-color: #bbf7d0;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  color: #166534;
}

.icon-button--success:hover {
  border-color: #86efac;
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #14532d;
}

.icon-button--danger {
  border-color: #fecaca;
  background: #fef2f2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

.icon-button--danger:hover {
  border-color: #fca5a5;
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #7f1d1d;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Badges                                                                     */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.status-badge,
.badge {
  min-height: 24px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 4px 9px;
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #334155;
  font-size: 11.5px;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: capitalize;
}

.status-badge--paid,
.badge--paid,
.status-badge--completed,
.badge--completed,
.status-badge--approved,
.badge--approved {
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #166534;
}

.status-badge--pending,
.badge--pending,
.status-badge--upcoming,
.badge--upcoming,
.status-badge--draft,
.badge--draft {
  background: #fef3c7;
  color: #92400e;
}

.status-badge--partial,
.badge--partial,
.status-badge--in-progress,
.badge--in-progress,
.status-badge--sent,
.badge--sent {
  background: #e0f2fe;
  color: #075985;
}

.status-badge--overdue,
.badge--overdue,
.status-badge--cancelled,
.badge--cancelled,
.status-badge--rejected,
.badge--rejected {
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

.status-badge--on-hold,
.badge--on-hold {
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #475569;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Projects Screen                                                            */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.projects-overview-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.project-stat-card {
  min-height: 108px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
}

.project-stat-card__icon {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.project-stat-card span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.project-stat-card strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 5px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 23px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  font-weight: 930;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.projects-toolbar {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(360px, 1fr) 205px 235px;
}

.projects-table-card {
  padding: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.projects-table-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 18px 18px 14px;
}

.projects-table-header h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 20px;
  line-height: 1.2;
  font-weight: 930;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
}

.projects-table-header p {
  margin-top: 4px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.projects-table-header__hint {
  border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  padding: 7px 11px;
  color: #166534;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.projects-table-wrap {
  max-height: calc(100vh - 330px);
  min-height: 360px;
}

.projects-table {
  min-width: 1580px;
}

.projects-table th {
  position: sticky;
  z-index: 2;
  top: 0;
}

.strong-cell {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-weight: 900 !important;
}

.money-cell {
  color: var(--emerald-dark) !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.description-cell {
  display: block;
  max-width: 300px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.status-inline-select {
  min-width: 145px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.status-under-select {
  margin-top: 6px;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Excel Import / Export                                                      */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.file-input {
  display: none;
}

.import-panel {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.1fr) minmax(360px, 480px);
  gap: 18px;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.import-panel--hero {
  border-color: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.24);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgb(16 185 129 / 0.08), transparent 34%),
    #ffffff;
}

.import-panel__content {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

.import-panel__content h2 {
  margin-top: 12px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 21px;
  font-weight: 920;
}

.import-panel__content p {
  margin-top: 8px;
  max-width: 660px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14.5px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.export-card__icon {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.export-card__icon svg {
  width: 21px;
  height: 21px;
}

.drop-zone {
  min-height: 220px;
  border: 2px dashed #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 11px;
  padding: 24px;
  color: #64748b;
  text-align: center;
  transition:
    border-color 160ms ease,
    background 160ms ease,
    color 160ms ease,
    transform 160ms ease;
}

.drop-zone:hover {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
}

.drop-zone--active {
  border-color: var(--emerald);
  background: #d1fae5;
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  transform: scale(1.006);
}

.drop-zone--busy {
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.drop-zone strong {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.drop-zone span {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.export-control-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 14px;
}

.export-control-panel__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
}

.export-control-panel__header h2 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.export-control-panel__header p {
  margin-top: 3px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.export-filters {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(320px, 1fr) 230px 210px;
  gap: 10px;
}

.export-summary-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(140px, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
}

.export-summary-grid > div {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  padding: 13px;
}

.export-summary-grid span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.export-summary-grid strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 6px;
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 920;
}

.export-preview {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #ffffff;
}

.export-preview__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: #f8fafc;
  padding: 14px;
}

.export-preview__header h3 {
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

.export-preview__header p {
  margin-top: 3px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.export-preview__header span {
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--emerald-soft);
  padding: 6px 10px;
  color: var(--emerald-dark);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.export-preview-table {
  min-width: 720px;
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Animation                                                                  */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.spin {
  animation: spin 850ms linear infinite;
}

@keyframes spin {
  to {
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Responsive                                                                 */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

@media (max-width: 1400px) {
  .projects-overview-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1280px) {
  .metrics {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(190px, 1fr));
  }

  .grid-2 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .import-panel {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .export-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .app-content {
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .page-header {
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .page-header h1,
  .page-title,
  h1 {
    font-size: 24px !important;
  }

  .form-grid,
  .table-toolbar,
  .projects-toolbar,
  .export-filters {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .projects-table-header,
  .export-control-panel__header,
  .export-preview__header {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .projects-table-header__hint {
    white-space: normal;
  }

  .projects-table-wrap {
    max-height: none;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .sidebar {
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 90;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    transition: transform 180ms ease;
  }

  .sidebar--open {
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .sidebar__close {
    display: inline-flex;
  }

  .mobile-menu {
    display: inline-flex;
  }

  .topbar {
    min-height: 60px;
    padding: 0 14px;
  }

  .topbar__left {
    min-width: auto;
  }

  .topbar__left strong {
    font-size: 16px;
  }

  .topbar__search-wrap,
  .topbar__import {
    display: none;
  }

  .app-content {
    padding: 14px;
  }

  .card {
    padding: 14px;
  }

  .page-header h1,
  .page-title,
  h1 {
    font-size: 22px !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .metrics,
  .projects-overview-grid,
  .export-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .drop-zone {
    min-height: 190px;
  }

  .form-actions {
    flex-direction: column-reverse;
  }

  .form-actions .button {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

This corrects the UI scale back to compact professional. It is only slightly larger and bolder than the original, not oversized.

Reply next and I’ll give the corrected:

src/presentation/components/app-shell.tsx

That file will remove export from the topbar and keep only Import at the top.


You said:

next

ChatGPT said:

Replace this file:

src/presentation/components/app-shell.tsx

With this corrected code:

TypeScript
"use client";

import Link from "next/link";
import { usePathname, useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { useMemo, useState, type ReactNode } from "react";
import {
  BarChart3,
  Bell,
  BriefcaseBusiness,
  CheckCircle2,
  ChevronDown,
  CircleDollarSign,
  FileBarChart,
  FileSpreadsheet,
  FileText,
  LayoutDashboard,
  Menu,
  Plus,
  ReceiptText,
  Search,
  Settings,
  Upload,
  Users,
  X,
} from "lucide-react";
import { routes } from "@/lib/routes";
import { BrandMark } from "@/presentation/components/brand-mark";
import { useAuth } from "@/presentation/providers/auth-provider";
import { useBusinessData } from "@/presentation/providers/business-data-provider";

const navItems = [
  ["Dashboard", routes.dashboard, LayoutDashboard],
  ["Clients", routes.clients, Users],
  ["Projects", routes.projects, BriefcaseBusiness],
  ["Quotations", routes.quotations, FileText],
  ["Ongoing Projects", routes.ongoingProjects, CircleDollarSign],
  ["Completed Projects", routes.completedProjects, CheckCircle2],
  ["Invoices & Payments", routes.invoices, ReceiptText],
  ["Pending Payments", routes.pendingPayments, CircleDollarSign],
  ["Statements", routes.statements, FileBarChart],
  ["Excel Import / Export", routes.excelExport, FileSpreadsheet],
  ["Reports", routes.reports, BarChart3],
] as const;

type SearchResult = {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  subtitle: string;
  href: string;
  type: string;
};

function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null) {
    return value as Record<string, unknown>;
  }

  return {};
}

function readNumber(value: unknown, fallback = 0) {
  return typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : fallback;
}

function readFirstString(
  record: Record<string, unknown>,
  keys: string[],
  fallback = ""
) {
  for (const key of keys) {
    const value = record[key];

    if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim()) {
      return value;
    }
  }

  return fallback;
}

export function AppShell({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const router = useRouter();

  const { user, logout } = useAuth();
  const { data, syncState, forceSync } = useBusinessData();

  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [searchOpen, setSearchOpen] = useState(false);
  const [syncing, setSyncing] = useState(false);

  const searchResults = useMemo<SearchResult[]>(() => {
    const query = search.trim().toLowerCase();

    if (!query) return [];

    const clients = data.clients
      .map((client) => {
        const record = asRecord(client);

        const id = readFirstString(record, ["id"], crypto.randomUUID());
        const title = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["companyName", "company", "name", "clientName", "customerName"],
          "Unnamed Client"
        );
        const city = readFirstString(record, ["city", "location"], "No city");
        const contact = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["contactPerson", "contact", "phone", "mobile"],
          "No contact"
        );

        return {
          id,
          title,
          subtitle: `${city} • ${contact}`,
          href: routes.clients,
          type: "Client",
        };
      })
      .filter((item) => {
        const target = `${item.id} ${item.title} ${item.subtitle}`.toLowerCase();
        return target.includes(query);
      })
      .slice(0, 4);

    const projects = data.projects
      .map((project) => {
        const record = asRecord(project);

        const id = readFirstString(record, ["id", "projectId"], crypto.randomUUID());
        const title = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["companyName", "company", "clientName", "customerName"],
          "Unnamed Project"
        );
        const location = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["location", "site", "storeBranch", "branch"],
          "No location"
        );
        const work = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["description", "workDescription", "scope", "category"],
          "No description"
        );

        return {
          id,
          title,
          subtitle: `${id} • ${location} • ${work}`,
          href: routes.projects,
          type: "Project",
        };
      })
      .filter((item) => {
