        const target = `${item.id} ${item.title} ${item.subtitle}`.toLowerCase();
        return target.includes(query);
      })
      .slice(0, 4);

    const invoices = data.invoices
      .map((invoice) => {
        const record = asRecord(invoice);

        const id = readFirstString(record, ["id", "invoiceNo"], crypto.randomUUID());
        const title = readFirstString(
          record,
          ["companyName", "company", "clientName", "customerName"],
          "Unnamed Invoice"
        );
        const status = readFirstString(record, ["status", "paymentStatus"], "unknown");
        const amount = readNumber(record.amount ?? record.invoiceAmount, 0);

        return {
          id,
          title,
          subtitle: `${id} • ${status} • ${amount}`,
          href: routes.invoices,
          type: "Invoice",
        };
      })
      .filter((item) => {
        const target = `${item.id} ${item.title} ${item.subtitle}`.toLowerCase();
        return target.includes(query);
      })
      .slice(0, 4);

    return [...clients, ...projects, ...invoices].slice(0, 8);
  }, [data.clients, data.invoices, data.projects, search]);

  async function handleSignOut() {
    await logout();
    router.replace(routes.login);
  }

  async function handleForceSync() {
    if (syncing) return;

    setSyncing(true);

    try {
      await forceSync();
    } finally {
      setSyncing(false);
    }
  }

  function handleResultClick(href: string) {
    setSearch("");
    setSearchOpen(false);
    setMobileOpen(false);
    router.push(href);
  }

  return (
    <div className="app-frame">
      {mobileOpen ? (
        <button
          className="sidebar-backdrop"
          aria-label="Close navigation"
          onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
          type="button"
        />
      ) : null}

      <aside className={`sidebar ${mobileOpen ? "sidebar--open" : ""}`}>
        <div className="sidebar__brand">
          <BrandMark inverse />

          <button
            className="sidebar__close"
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
            aria-label="Close menu"
            type="button"
          >
            <X />
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="sidebar__quick-actions">
          <Link
            className="sidebar__primary"
            href={routes.excelExport}
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
          >
            <Upload size={16} />
            Import
          </Link>

          <Link
            className="sidebar__primary sidebar__primary--ghost"
            href={routes.newProject}
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
          >
            <Plus size={16} />
            New Project
          </Link>
        </div>

        <nav className="sidebar__nav" aria-label="Main navigation">
          {navItems.map(([label, href, Icon]) => {
            const isActive =
              pathname === href ||
              (href === routes.projects && pathname.startsWith("/projects"));

            return (
              <Link
                key={href}
                href={href}
                onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
                className={isActive ? "is-active" : ""}
              >
                <Icon size={17} />
                <span>{label}</span>
              </Link>
            );
          })}
        </nav>

        <div className="sidebar__footer">
          <button
            className={`sync-pill sync-pill--${syncState}`}
            type="button"
            onClick={handleForceSync}
            disabled={syncing}
            title="Force cloud sync"
          >
            <span />
            {syncing ? "Syncing..." : syncState}
          </button>

          <Link
            className={`sidebar__settings ${
              pathname === routes.settings ? "is-active" : ""
            }`}
            href={routes.settings}
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
          >
            <Settings size={17} />
            <span>Settings</span>
          </Link>
        </div>
      </aside>

      <div className="app-main">
        <header className="topbar">
          <div className="topbar__left">
            <button
              className="mobile-menu"
              onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}
              aria-label="Open menu"
              type="button"
            >
              <Menu />
            </button>

            <strong>3Star Business Suite</strong>
          </div>

          <div className="topbar__search-wrap">
            <label className="topbar__search">
              <Search size={15} />
              <input
                placeholder="Search clients, projects, invoices..."
                aria-label="Global search"
                value={search}
                onChange={(event) => {
                  setSearch(event.target.value);
                  setSearchOpen(true);
                }}
                onFocus={() => setSearchOpen(true)}
              />
            </label>

            {searchOpen && search.trim() ? (
              <div className="global-search-menu">
                {searchResults.length ? (
                  searchResults.map((item) => (
                    <button
                      key={`${item.type}-${item.id}`}
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => handleResultClick(item.href)}
                    >
                      <span>{item.type}</span>
                      <strong>{item.title}</strong>
                      <small>{item.subtitle}</small>
                    </button>
                  ))
                ) : (
                  <div className="global-search-empty">No records found.</div>
                )}
              </div>
            ) : null}
          </div>

          <div className="topbar__actions">
            <Link className="button button--primary topbar__import" href={routes.excelExport}>
              <Upload size={14} />
              Import
            </Link>

            <button aria-label="Notifications" type="button">
              <Bell size={17} />
            </button>

            <button
              className="profile-button"
              onClick={handleSignOut}
              title="Sign out"
              type="button"
            >
              <span>{user?.email?.slice(0, 1).toUpperCase() || "U"}</span>
              <ChevronDown size={14} />
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>

        {searchOpen && search.trim() ? (
          <button
            className="search-backdrop"
            aria-label="Close search"
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setSearchOpen(false)}
          />
        ) : null}

        <main className="app-content">{children}</main>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

Changes made:

Topbar: Import only
Topbar: Removed New Project button
Topbar: Removed Import / Export wording
Sidebar quick action: Import only
Dedicated sidebar page remains: Excel Import / Export
No export action appears outside the Excel Import / Export screen

Reply next and I’ll give the export engine file that preserves your uploaded Excel template formatting/logo/header and only replaces data.


You said:

20260619-2138-52.0370180.mp4
File
fix this ugly text screen use a loading indicator instead or shimmer effect and also fix the new project screen stull not working

ChatGPT said:

You have two separate problems:

  1. The ugly loading text happened because the CSS file no longer had proper splash/loading styles.

  2. New Project is not working because your provider must expose createProject, updateProject, deleteRecord, etc.

Do this first.

1. Add this at the bottom of src/app/globals.css

CSS
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* Clean Loading / Splash Shimmer                                             */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.splash {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgb(16 185 129 / 0.16), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #111827 48%, #064e3b 100%);
  color: #ffffff;
  padding: 24px;
}

.splash__center {
  width: min(420px, 100%);
  display: grid;
  justify-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  text-align: center;
}

.splash__center h1 {
  margin: 4px 0 0;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 28px !important;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 930 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
}

.splash__center p {
  margin: 0;
  color: rgb(226 232 240 / 0.82);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 550;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.splash__progress {
  position: fixed;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 54px;
  width: min(320px, calc(100vw - 48px));
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.splash__progress span {
  display: none;
}

.splash__progress::before {
  content: "";
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  justify-self: center;
  border: 4px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.18);
  border-top-color: #10b981;
  border-radius: 999px;
  animation: spin 850ms linear infinite;
}

.splash__progress i {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  height: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.14);
}

.splash__progress i::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 45%;
  border-radius: inherit;
  background: linear-gradient(
    90deg,
    transparent,
    rgb(16 185 129 / 0.95),
    transparent
  );
  animation: shimmerMove 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes shimmerMove {
  0% {
    transform: translateX(-120%);
  }

  100% {
    transform: translateX(260%);
  }
}

2. Replace src/presentation/providers/business-data-provider.tsx

This fixes New Project not saving.

TypeScript
"use client";

import {
  createContext,
  useCallback,
  useContext,
  useEffect,
  useMemo,
  useState,
  type ReactNode,
} from "react";
import type { BusinessDataSet } from "@/domain/entities/business";
import {
  parseBusinessWorkbook,
  type ImportResult,
} from "@/application/services/excel-import";
import { FirebaseBusinessDataRepository } from "@/infrastructure/firebase/business-data-repository";
import workbook from "@/data/workbook-data.json";
import { useAuth } from "@/presentation/providers/auth-provider";

type SyncState = "synced" | "syncing" | "offline" | "error";

type CollectionKey = "clients" | "projects" | "quotations" | "invoices";

type EntityMap = {
  clients: BusinessDataSet["clients"][number];
  projects: BusinessDataSet["projects"][number];
  quotations: BusinessDataSet["quotations"][number];
  invoices: BusinessDataSet["invoices"][number];
};

interface BusinessDataContextValue {
  data: BusinessDataSet;
  loading: boolean;
  syncState: SyncState;
  lastError: string;

  importFile: (file: File) => Promise<ImportResult>;

  createRecord: <TKey extends CollectionKey>(
    key: TKey,
    record: EntityMap[TKey]
  ) => Promise<void>;

  updateRecord: <TKey extends CollectionKey>(
    key: TKey,
    record: EntityMap[TKey]
  ) => Promise<void>;

  deleteRecord: <TKey extends CollectionKey>(
    key: TKey,
    id: string
  ) => Promise<void>;

  patchRecord: <TKey extends CollectionKey>(
    key: TKey,
    id: string,
    patch: Partial<EntityMap[TKey]>
  ) => Promise<void>;

  createProject: (project: EntityMap["projects"]) => Promise<void>;
  updateProject: (project: EntityMap["projects"]) => Promise<void>;

  updateProjectStatus: (
    id: string,
    status: EntityMap["projects"] extends { status: infer TStatus }
      ? TStatus
      : string
  ) => Promise<void>;

  updateQuotationStatus: (
    id: string,
    status: EntityMap["quotations"] extends { status: infer TStatus }
      ? TStatus
      : string
  ) => Promise<void>;

  updateInvoiceStatus: (
    id: string,
    status: EntityMap["invoices"] extends { status: infer TStatus }
      ? TStatus
      : string
  ) => Promise<void>;

  updateInvoicePayment: (
    id: string,
    patch: Partial<EntityMap["invoices"]>
  ) => Promise<void>;

  forceSync: () => Promise<void>;
}

const initialData = workbook as unknown as BusinessDataSet;

const BusinessDataContext = createContext<BusinessDataContextValue | null>(null);

const localKey = "3star-business-data";
const pendingKey = "3star-pending-sync";

function isBrowser() {
  return typeof window !== "undefined";
}

function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  if (typeof value === "object" && value !== null) {
    return value as Record<string, unknown>;
  }

  return {};
}

function getRecordId(value: unknown) {
  const record = asRecord(value);

  const possibleId =
    record.id ??
    record.projectId ??
    record.invoiceNo ??
    record.quotationNo ??
    record.companyId;

  if (typeof possibleId === "string" && possibleId.trim()) {
    return possibleId;
  }

  return "";
}

function getOnlineState() {
  if (!isBrowser()) return true;
  return navigator.onLine;
}

function saveLocal(data: BusinessDataSet) {
  if (!isBrowser()) return;

  window.localStorage.setItem(localKey, JSON.stringify(data));
}

function readLocal() {
  if (!isBrowser()) return null;

  const local = window.localStorage.getItem(localKey);

  if (!local) return null;

  try {
    return JSON.parse(local) as BusinessDataSet;
  } catch {
    window.localStorage.removeItem(localKey);
    return null;
  }
}

function savePending(data: BusinessDataSet, source: string) {
  if (!isBrowser()) return;

  window.localStorage.setItem(
    pendingKey,
    JSON.stringify({
      data,
      source,
    })
  );
}

function clearPending() {
  if (!isBrowser()) return;
  window.localStorage.removeItem(pendingKey);
}

function readPending() {
  if (!isBrowser()) return null;

  const pending = window.localStorage.getItem(pendingKey);

  if (!pending) return null;

  try {
    return JSON.parse(pending) as {
      data: BusinessDataSet;
      source: string;
    };
  } catch {
    window.localStorage.removeItem(pendingKey);
    return null;
  }
}

export function BusinessDataProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  const { user } = useAuth();

  const repository = useMemo(() => new FirebaseBusinessDataRepository(), []);

  const [data, setData] = useState<BusinessDataSet>(initialData);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [syncState, setSyncState] = useState<SyncState>("synced");
  const [lastError, setLastError] = useState("");

  const sync = useCallback(
    async (next: BusinessDataSet, source: string) => {
      if (!user) {
        throw new Error("Your session has expired. Sign in and retry.");
      }

      setSyncState("syncing");

      try {
        await repository.replace(user.uid, next, source);
        clearPending();
        setSyncState("synced");
        setLastError("");
      } catch (caughtError) {
        savePending(next, source);
        setSyncState(getOnlineState() ? "error" : "offline");
        setLastError(
          caughtError instanceof Error
            ? caughtError.message
            : "Cloud synchronization failed."
        );

        throw caughtError;
      }
    },
    [repository, user]
  );

  const persistLocal = useCallback((next: BusinessDataSet) => {
    setData(next);

    try {
      saveLocal(next);
    } catch {
      setLastError("Local offline storage failed.");
    }
  }, []);

  const persistAndSync = useCallback(
    async (next: BusinessDataSet, source: string) => {
      persistLocal(next);

      try {
        await sync(next, source);
      } catch {
        // Local update already happened. Sync will retry later.
      }
    },
    [persistLocal, sync]
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user) return;

    let active = true;

    const local = readLocal();

    if (local) {
      setData(local);
    }

    repository
      .load(user.uid)
      .then((cloud) => {
        if (!active) return;

        if (cloud) {
          setData(cloud);
          saveLocal(cloud);
        }
      })
      .catch((caughtError) => {
        if (!active) return;

        setLastError(
          caughtError instanceof Error
            ? caughtError.message
            : "Cloud data could not be loaded."
        );

        setSyncState(getOnlineState() ? "error" : "offline");
      })
      .finally(() => {
        if (active) {
          setLoading(false);
        }
      });

    return () => {
      active = false;
    };
  }, [repository, user]);

  useEffect(() => {
    function retryPendingSync() {
      const pending = readPending();

      if (!pending) return;

      void sync(pending.data, pending.source).catch(() => undefined);
    }

    window.addEventListener("online", retryPendingSync);

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("online", retryPendingSync);
    };
  }, [sync]);

  const importFile = useCallback(
    async (file: File) => {
      const parsed = await parseBusinessWorkbook(file, data);

      const next: BusinessDataSet = {
        company: parsed.company,
        clients: parsed.clients.length ? parsed.clients : data.clients,
        projects: parsed.projects.length ? parsed.projects : data.projects,
        quotations: parsed.quotations.length
          ? parsed.quotations
          : data.quotations,
        invoices: parsed.invoices.length ? parsed.invoices : data.invoices,
      };

      persistLocal(next);

      try {
        await sync(next, file.name);
      } catch {
        parsed.warnings.push(
          "Data is available locally but cloud sync is pending. It will retry when connectivity returns."
        );
      }

      return parsed;
    },
    [data, persistLocal, sync]
  );

  const createRecord = useCallback(
    async <TKey extends CollectionKey>(key: TKey, record: EntityMap[TKey]) => {
      const next = {
        ...data,
        [key]: [...data[key], record],
      } as BusinessDataSet;

      await persistAndSync(next, `create-${key}`);
    },
    [data, persistAndSync]
  );

  const updateRecord = useCallback(
    async <TKey extends CollectionKey>(key: TKey, record: EntityMap[TKey]) => {
      const id = getRecordId(record);

      if (!id) {
        throw new Error("Record ID is missing.");
      }

      const next = {
        ...data,
        [key]: data[key].map((item) =>
          getRecordId(item) === id ? record : item
        ),
      } as BusinessDataSet;

      await persistAndSync(next, `update-${key}`);
    },
    [data, persistAndSync]
  );

  const deleteRecord = useCallback(
    async <TKey extends CollectionKey>(key: TKey, id: string) => {
      const next = {
        ...data,
        [key]: data[key].filter((item) => getRecordId(item) !== id),
      } as BusinessDataSet;

      await persistAndSync(next, `delete-${key}`);
    },
    [data, persistAndSync]
  );

  const patchRecord = useCallback(
    async <TKey extends CollectionKey>(
      key: TKey,
      id: string,
      patch: Partial<EntityMap[TKey]>
    ) => {
      const next = {
        ...data,
        [key]: data[key].map((item) => {
          if (getRecordId(item) !== id) return item;

          return {
            ...asRecord(item),
            ...patch,
          };
        }),
      } as BusinessDataSet;

      await persistAndSync(next, `patch-${key}`);
    },
    [data, persistAndSync]
  );

  const createProject = useCallback(
    async (project: EntityMap["projects"]) => {
      await createRecord("projects", project);
    },
    [createRecord]
  );

  const updateProject = useCallback(
    async (project: EntityMap["projects"]) => {
      await updateRecord("projects", project);
    },
    [updateRecord]
  );

  const updateProjectStatus = useCallback(
    async (
      id: string,
      status: EntityMap["projects"] extends { status: infer TStatus }
        ? TStatus
        : string
    ) => {
      await patchRecord("projects", id, {
        status,
      } as Partial<EntityMap["projects"]>);
    },
    [patchRecord]
  );

  const updateQuotationStatus = useCallback(
    async (
      id: string,
      status: EntityMap["quotations"] extends { status: infer TStatus }
        ? TStatus
        : string
    ) => {
      await patchRecord("quotations", id, {
        status,
      } as Partial<EntityMap["quotations"]>);
    },
    [patchRecord]
  );

  const updateInvoiceStatus = useCallback(
    async (
      id: string,
      status: EntityMap["invoices"] extends { status: infer TStatus }
        ? TStatus
        : string
    ) => {
      await patchRecord("invoices", id, {
        status,
      } as Partial<EntityMap["invoices"]>);
    },
    [patchRecord]
  );

  const updateInvoicePayment = useCallback(
    async (id: string, patch: Partial<EntityMap["invoices"]>) => {
      await patchRecord("invoices", id, patch);
    },
    [patchRecord]
  );

  const forceSync = useCallback(async () => {
    await sync(data, "manual-sync");
  }, [data, sync]);

  const value = useMemo<BusinessDataContextValue>(
    () => ({
      data,
      loading,
      syncState,
      lastError,

      importFile,

      createRecord,
      updateRecord,
      deleteRecord,
      patchRecord,

      createProject,
      updateProject,

      updateProjectStatus,
      updateQuotationStatus,
      updateInvoiceStatus,
      updateInvoicePayment,

      forceSync,
    }),
    [
      data,
      loading,
      syncState,
      lastError,
      importFile,
      createRecord,
      updateRecord,
      deleteRecord,
      patchRecord,
      createProject,
      updateProject,
      updateProjectStatus,
      updateQuotationStatus,
      updateInvoiceStatus,
      updateInvoicePayment,
      forceSync,
    ]
  );

  return (
    <BusinessDataContext.Provider value={value}>
      {children}
    </BusinessDataContext.Provider>
  );
}

export function useBusinessData() {
  const value = useContext(BusinessDataContext);

  if (!value) {
    throw new Error("useBusinessData must be used inside BusinessDataProvider.");
  }

  return value;
}

This fixes the provider side of New Project. If the form still does not save after this, the remaining issue is inside new-project-screen.tsx.

Reply next and I’ll give the corrected full new-project-screen.tsx.


ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info.
